name: Ancient Reading
flavor: The knowledge of yore shall be held by the minds of the living.
description: You designate a target within range. If it is a symbol of some kind, you learn its true meaning. If it is a passage of text written in an ancient or dead language, you may read it.

name: Antivenom
flavor: A small dose to stave off the worst effects.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to **regain ST** equal to your spellcasting modifier. Additionally, if the target is poisoned or is incurring potion toxicity penalties, those effects are suppressed until this spell ends.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, the ST recovery roll increases by **Xd6**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Bristle Lash
flavor: A thorny vine wraps around an enemy and draws them in.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **piercing damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the target is pulled 10 feet towards you and the damage roll increases by **Xd6**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the target is pulled 10 feet towards you and the damage roll increases by Xd6, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Cold Snap
flavor: Frigid air dances about your focus before concentrating into a chilled blast.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **cold damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier and is slowed until this spell ends.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the damage roll increases by **Xd8**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the damage roll increases by Xd8, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Corrosion
flavor: You launch a spray of weighted acid to melt away their defenses.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **acid damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier and its AC is reduced by one guard step (their AC is either their Full Guard AC, Half Guard AC, or Base AC) until this spell ends.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the damage roll increases by **Xd10**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the damage roll increases by Xd10, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Cubify
flavor: Turning everything into completely featureless cubes allows for much more efficient packing.
description:
You cause a target Tiny or Small unattended object within range to become polymorphed into a Tiny object with 5 HP, 15 AC, and 5 Toughness until this spell ends. This new form does not retain any characteristics or features from the target's original form except for its weight. This spell ends early if the new form is destroyed.

You choose the new form the first time you ever cast **Cubify**. Each time you cast **Cubify** thereafter, the new form must be exactly identical to what you chose the first time.

A creature guessing the identity of an object polymorphed by **Cubify** based on the weight they feel while holding it may be able to confirm their guess upon succeeding a DC 15 INT effort or trade check.

name: Death Grip
flavor: You choke the life out of something before it can renew itself.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **necrotic damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier and is unable to restore HP or ST through means other than burning a Resolve until this spell ends.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, If you do, the damage roll increases by **Xd10**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, If you do, the damage roll increases by Xd10, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Deflection Sigil
duration: Until you cast **Deflection Sigil** again or take a long rest
flavor: You inscribe a warding tattoo that nudges attacks away from the vital organs.
description: You cause the next critical hit against the target before this spell ends to instead be counted as a normal hit. After this occurs, this spell ends early.

name: Glamour
flavor: You chisel your features to an unbelievable degree of beauty.
description: Before you make a CHA effort or trade check before this spell ends, you may end this spell to gain advantage on the check.

name: Glass Hand
flavor: Lightning captured in a hand-shaped bottle. Your fragile accessory is the perfect solution to the problem of unlabeled switches.
description:
You conjure a *glass hand* at a target location within range that persists until this spell ends. The glass hand is a Tiny object with 5 HP, 15 AC, 0 Toughness, advanced Hovering mobility, and a Speed equal to this spell's range. This spell ends early if the glass hand is destroyed, if the glass hand is ever further than this spell's range from you, or you cast **Glass Hand** again.

**Automaton.** You may issue the *commands* listed below to an object of your choice created by this spell. You must take the listed kind of action in each of the following commands to activate this spell trait, and each free action command may only be performed once per round:

* **Fetch (action).** The glass hand takes the Pick Up action targeting a Tiny object and then travels up to its Speed towards you.

* **Interact (object interaction).** The glass hand takes the Fidget object interaction.

* **Move (free action during your turn).** The glass hand travels up to its Speed.

name: Golden Blade
flavor: You form a blade of heavenly starlight with a sharpness cutting through your foes and breaking the reins of fate itself.
description:
You make a melee spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **radiant damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the following effects occur:

* **Bonus Damage.** The damage roll increases by **Xd10**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

* **Uplift.** You may designate a target ally other than yourself within 30 feet of you and grant them advantage on the next attack check they make before this spell ends.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the following effects occur: Bonus Damage. The damage roll increases by Xd10, where X is half your Tier Bonus. Uplift. You may designate a target ally other than yourself within 30 feet of you and grant them advantage on the next attack check they make before this spell ends.

name: Ignition Primer
flavor: You sling a bolt of sparks and cinders, eager to catch aflame.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **fire damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, you set the target ablaze.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, you set the target ablaze.

name: KeepsakeРІР‚в„ўs Calling
flavor: The nature, size, shape, and appearance of an object carries with it a reputation. A name pulled from the threads of artisanship.
description: You learn the name of a target object within range and gain advantage on INT effort or trade checks made to recall information regarding the target object. This spell treats effects with the **Illusion** spell trait as real and determines the name based only on the target's appearance and not its material composition.

name: Magicnetic Needle
flavor: A silvered arrow to your greatest foe: other wizards.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. You gain advantage on the attack check if the target is concentrating on an effect. On a hit, the target is dealt **force damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, you may increase the damage roll by **Xd8**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, you may increase the damage roll by Xd8, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Mending
flavor: You help recall an object's younger memories.
description: You heal all missing HP of a target Small or smaller object within range whose Toughness is less than or equal to 5 x half your Tier Bonus.

name: Mischief
flavor: It's the minor bits of chaos that keep them guessing.
description:
You may choose for the casting of this spell to be imperceptible. You create one of the following effects of your choosing:

* **Flicker.** You cause a target Tiny flammable object within range, such as a torch or candle, to either become ablaze or become cleansed of being ablaze.

* **Lock.** You close and lock a target door, container, or otherwise lockable object within range.

* **Veiled.** You cause a target Tiny object within range to be unnoticeable unless someone is searching for it for the next hour.

name: Momentary Stupor
flavor: You fire a psychic ray that causes the foe to take a moment to collect themselves.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target takes **psychic damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier and incurs disadvantage on the next attack check they make before this spell ends.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the damage roll increases by **Xd6**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the damage roll increases by Xd6, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Overclock
flavor: Grease the wheels and watch as the seconds tick by 10% faster.
description: You cleanse the slowed condition from a target creature within range. Additionally, the target's Speed is increased by 5 feet until this spell ends.

name: Prismatic Blast
flavor: You envision a reality without limits. A rainbow without ends.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier. Roll a d4 to determine the attack's damage type: 1 is **acid**, 2 is **cold**, 3 is **fire**, and 4 is **lightning**.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, If you do, the damage roll increases by **Xd8**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, If you do, the damage roll increases by Xd8, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Razor Claws
flavor: Bone, though seemingly immutable, can also be forged like metal.
description:
This spell may be cast at any point. Until this spell ends, you gain the following benefits:

* **Claws.** When using the Unarmed fighting style, you may convert the damage dealt from your weapon attacks to **slashing** and use your Martial Die to calculate their damage (ignoring the **Minimum Damage** trait).

* **Cling.** If you are falling and a wall is within your Reach when you cast this spell, you stop your fall and negate the falling damage, remaining clung to the wall until you take a free action to let go. When you let go, you leave a foothold where you had dug into the wall.

name: Repaint
flavor: All things could use a dash of color every now and then.
description:
You cause either a target Medium or smaller object within range or a 5 foot square originating from a target surface within range to take on a new appearance until this spell ends. This new appearance can include symbols, text, colors, patterns, or multiple of these, but cannot alter the shape of the target. This spell ends early if you cast **Repaint** again.

**Illusion.** This spell effect is intangible but creatures perceive it as real until they attempt to physically interact with it. As an action, a creature that **perceives** this effect may make a **Quick-Wits** saving throw. On a success, the effect becomes obviously illusory to them.

name: Sign
flavor: With a small miracle, you nudge the world onto a better path.
description:
You may choose for the casting of this spell to be imperceptible. You create one of the following effects of your choosing:

* **Light.** You cause a target object within range to illuminate its surroundings for the next hour.

* **Preservation.** You cause a target object within range to cease rotting or spoiling for the next hour. If the target is a corpse, it cannot be raised as undead while affected by this spell.

* **Soulsearch.** You learn the number of creatures that are within 30 feet of you.

name: Snowball
flavor: You sling a freezing ball of snow. Occasionally, there is a rock inside.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **cold damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier. If this attack scores a critical hit, the target falls prone.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the critical hit threshold for this attack is retroactively reduced by 1 and the damage roll increases by **Xd6**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the critical hit threshold for this attack is retroactively reduced by 1 and the damage roll increases by Xd6, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: SoothsayerРІР‚в„ўs Gaze
flavor: You coalesce the imparted omniscience of gods into a deadly force.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **psychic damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier and you gain advantage on the next Analyze check you make against it before the end of combat.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the damage roll increases by **Xd6**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the damage roll increases by Xd6, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Spark of Hope
flavor: A spark in the darkness to keep the fire burning.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to **regain ST** equal to your spellcasting modifier.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, the ST recovery roll increases by **Xd6**, where X is half your Tier Bonus. If the target is frightened, this spell's ST recovery roll is replaced with the maximum possible total.

name: Spectral Lantern
flavor: You bind a portion of your soul into a lantern and let it fly. It is you, and it shall light the way.
description:
You summon a *spectral lantern* at a target location within range that persists until this spell ends. The spectral lantern is an object that has HP equal to 5 x your Tier Bonus, 15 AC, 10 Toughness, a Speed equal to this spell's range, and advanced Hovering mobility. This spell ends early if the spectral lantern is destroyed or you cast **Spectral Lantern** again. The spectral lantern illuminates its surroundings.

As an object interaction, you may cause the spectral lantern to travel up its Speed. This spell ends early if the spectral lantern is ever further than four times this spell's range from you.

**Scrying.** As an action, you may choose an object created by this spell and begin perceiving as if you were located at it. As a free action, you may end this effect. While perceiving in this manner, you are always **aware** of subjects within 15 feet of the object and are **uncertain** of all subjects beyond this distance.

name: Startle
flavor: Spooked ya\!
description: You cause a target creature within range to make a **Courage** saving throw. On a failure, if the target has no Resolve remaining, they must drop everything they are holding.

name: Static Shock
flavor: You precisely overwhelm a nearby target with electricity.
description:
You make a melee spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **lightning damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier and loses a reaction if it had one.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the damage roll increases by **Xd12**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the damage roll increases by Xd12, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Theatrics
flavor: You exemplify the beauty that arises from the composure of many small things falling into place at just the right time.
description:
You may choose for the casting of this spell to be imperceptible. You create one of the following effects of your choosing:

* **Cue.** You choose a creature you are aware of within range to learn that this spell has been cast on them.

* **Flourish.** You create a harmless sensory effect, such as a puff of smoke, shower of sparks, or spray of confetti at a target location within range that persists until the end of the current turn. The effect can include a visual, auditory, and olfactory component simultaneously.

* **Vibe Check.** You target three or more creatures within range with this spell and learn the surface-level emotion, thought, or idea that is on the majority of the targets's minds.

name: Touchstone
duration: Until the end of your next short or long rest
flavor: A figment of their essence drawn into a memento. Peering into yourself, you find them in your own heart.
description: You designate a target creature within range. Until this spell ends, you are **aware** of an affected creature and its location. This spell ends early if an affected creature is further than 1 mile from you.

name: Tricksleeve
duration: Until you cast this spell again
flavor: With the flick of your wrist, a veil of twilight envelops a small trinket and sequesters it away.
description:
You cause a target unattended object of size Tiny within range to be sent away into an extradimensional space of your own. You may end this spell as part of the Retrieve object interaction to retrieve the object. Otherwise, it falls to the ground to an unoccupied space nearest to you if this spell ends through any other means.

If you cast **Tricksleeve** as a prepared spell, the effect ends early when you cease to have **Tricksleeve** prepared.

name: Windblast
flavor: You accelerate drifting air currents into a concussive force.
description:
You make a ranged spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target is dealt **bludgeoning damage** equal to your spellcasting modifier.

**Discharge.** You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the target is pushed 10 feet away from you and the damage roll increases by **Xd6**, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

# **List of 1st Circle Spells**

discharge.discharge_description: Discharge. You may take an additional action when you hit with the attack. If you do, the target is pushed 10 feet away from you and the damage roll increases by Xd6, where X is half your Tier Bonus.

name: Abyssal Bleed
flavor: You scream truths of eldritch malice and command them to scatter.
description:
You designate three target creatures within range and mark them with *abyssal bleed* until this spell ends. If two creatures marked with abyssal bleed are within 10 feet of each other and one of them starts their turn, they and all creatures and objects within 5 feet of them take **1d6 necrotic damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's damage now occurs when a creature marked with abyssal bleed starts their turn within 30 feet of another creature marked with abyssal bleed.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The abyssal bleed's damage radius becomes 10 feet.

name: Acrid Spine
flavor: Caustic spikes rupture the earth as you prepare a deadly blow.
description:
You cause a 10 foot square area originating on a target surface within range to permanently become difficult terrain and deal **1d4 acid damage** to all creatures and objects on it.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. If the attack hits, it deals an additional **2d6 acid damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's initial damage roll increases by 1d4 and its bonus attack damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The square area's side length becomes 20 feet.

name: Animate Interceptor
flavor: While most automata obey the rule of "do no harm", some take it a step further.
description:
You conjure an *animate interceptor* at a target unoccupied space within range that persists until this spell ends. The animate interceptor is a Small object with 15 HP, 15 AC, 5 Toughness, and advanced Hovering mobility. This spell ends early if it is destroyed.

**Automaton.** You may issue the *commands* listed below to an object of your choice created by this spell by taking its listed kind of action. Each command may only be performed once per round:

* **Project Shield (free action).** You may only issue this command when an ally within 30 feet of the animate interceptor is attacked. The animate interceptor travels to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the ally and grants them their Full Guard AC against the attack.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above, Repeatable)** The first, third, and fifth times you choose this enhancement, **Project Shield** may be used an additional time per round.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The animate interceptor's HP increases by 10 and its Toughness increases by 5\.

name: Augury
flavor: A reading of stars dancing in the palm of your hand.
description:
You ask a question that does not elicit a binary response (i.e. "yes" or "no" questions are disallowed) and receive an objectively true one-word response, if one exists. You may cast this spell at most once per hour.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** All responses from this spell become full sentences, but each contains both a truth and a lie.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** After receiving the response to the first question, you may ask a second followup question and receive an objectively true one-word response, if one exists.

name: Arc Spindle
flavor: Electric strands coil around your arm as you bind the heartbeats of your foes with a fizzling shock.
description:
You designate a target within range.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you may designate up to two additional unique targets within 15 feet of any previous target.

You may use the **Expound** trait of **Arc Spindle** effects twice instead of only once. All targets must make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **2d8 lightning damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d8.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's range becomes 60 feet and the maximum distance between unique targets becomes 30 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** Each usage of the **Expound** trait allows you to designate an additional unique target.

name: Armor of Souls
flavor: The souls of those who love you continue to protect you.
description:
You grant up to three target allies within range their Half Guard AC until this spell ends. If at any point all affected creatures have their Full Guard AC simultaneously, this spell is *upgraded* for all affected creatures until this spell ends.

While this spell is upgraded, critical hits against any affected creature are negated and instead count as a normal hit.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You target an additional creature within range.

name: Astral Darts
flavor: You sling bolts of energized stardust as a barrage of seeking missiles.
description:
You deal **2d6 force damage** to up to three targets within range.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You may target an additional creature within range.

name: Bane
flavor: You burden an opponent with the crushing weight of misfortune.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a **Will** saving throw. On a failure, an affected creature subtracts 1d4 from all ability checks they make until this spell ends. At the end of an affected creature's turn, they may retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

**Contagion.** As a reaction when a creature affected by a spell effect with contagion trait dies, is knocked out, or burns a Resolve, you may cause a different target creature within range to become affected by the spell as if it had failed the saving throw.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** The affected creature must take an action to retry the saving throw. This action may only be taken once per round.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You may target an additional creature within range.

name: Bend Luck
flavor: To flip a coin is to cast yourself amidst the whims of an unthinking universe. It's time to pick a side.
description:
You designate up to two target creatures within range. Once before this spell ends, an affected creature may choose to do either of the following:

* **Heads.** When an affected creature makes an attack check, they may end this spell for them to gain advantage on the attack check.

* **Tails.** When an affected creature is attacked, they may end this spell for them to impose disadvantage on the attack check.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 CHA and above)** An affected creature may each use **Heads** and **Tails** once before this spell ends.

name: Briar Plate
duration: Until the end of your next long rest
flavor: Twigs and thorns twist into a spiny carapace.
description:
Until this spell ends, you gain the following benefits:

* **Armor.** You may act as if you are wearing Stock Armor and without needing to meet its STR requirement.

* **Thorns.** When a melee attack is made against you, you may take a reaction to deal **1d6 piercing damage** to the attacker.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d6.

name: Cloak
duration: Until the end of your next short or long rest
flavor: The eyes refuse to focus on the shrouded form, the mind compensating for the missing space.
description:
You cause a target Large or smaller creature or object within range to gain the **Stealthy** trait from the invisible condition until this spell ends, granting them advantage on ability checks made to cause **intrigued** sentries to return to being **relaxed**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** You may choose for the casting of this spell to be imperceptible.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's casting time becomes 3 actions and its range becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You may target an additional creature within range.

name: Command
flavor: You wield your influence like a hammer hitting a nail.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a **Will** saving throw and speak a one-word command.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you may target a second creature.

The command you speak may be any word you wish, and a creature that fails the saving throw must follow that command however it wishes on its next turn. Some examples of command words are provided below, and you are welcome to come up with your own:

* **Drop.** The creature falls prone on their turn.

* **Flee.** The creature attempts to end their turn further away from you by at least an amount equal to their Speed.

* **Halt.** The creature does not move on their turn.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You may target an additional creature within range.

name: Corpse Bomb
flavor: Undeath prides itself on its perpetuity. You remind them of the fragile balance of vital forces at play.
description:
You cause a target undead creature within range to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **4d8 force damage**. If the target diesis brought to 0 HP and no Resolve from by this spell's initial damage, they explode and deal **2d6 force damage** to all creatures and objects within 10 feet of it.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's target damage roll increases by 4d8 and the explosion damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** Any undead creature that dies from brought to 0 HP and no Resolve by an explosion from this spell also explode.

name: Defender Drone
duration: Until the end of your next long rest
flavor: The shrill, blaring noise it makes is sure to awaken even the heaviest of sleepers.
description:
You summon a *defender drone* at a target unoccupied space within range that persists until this spell ends. The defender drone is a Small object with 15 HP, 15 AC, 10 Toughness, and has a Search DC equal to this spell's Save DC. This spell ends early if it is destroyed, if it is ever further than this spell's range from you, or you cast **Defender Drone** again. The defender drone acts as a sentry outside of combat with its alertness starting as **relaxed**.

**Automaton.** You may issue the *commands* listed below to an object of your choice created by this spell by taking its listed kind of action. Each command may only be performed once per round:

* **Arcane Zap (action).** The defender drone makes a ranged spell attack (using your spell attack bonus) against a target within 30 feet of it. On a hit, you deal **1d10 lightning damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d10.

name: Disguise
duration: Until the end of your next short or long rest
flavor: If you plan to get into trouble, you should at least fit in.
description:
You change the appearance of a target creature within range to a new one of your choosing until this spell ends. This effect may include altering the appearance of worn clothing and equipment, the coloration and texture of skin, the placement and appearance of appendages on one's body (such as arms, legs, eyes, ears, or tails; any appendages removed with this spell are instead invisible), and stature, though this spell may not alter a creature's Size.

Spell effects with the **Sensor** trait identify affected creatures according to their new appearance from this spell.

**Illusion.** This spell effect is intangible but creatures perceive it as real until they attempt to physically interact with it. As an action, a creature that **perceives** this effect may make a **Quick-Wits** saving throw. On a success, the effect becomes obviously illusory to them.	

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell may now also alter an affected creature's voice as a part of their new appearance.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** An affected creature may take an action to change their appearance again to a new one of their choosing.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** This spell may now alter an affected creature's apparent Size by one category larger or smaller.

name: Dispel
flavor: When you ascend the Circles of magic, your enemies must follow.
description:
You target creature or persistent magic (as defined by the Sense Magic action) within range and cause an effect depending on its type:

* **Creature.** You destroy all spell effects affecting the target up to and including 1st Circle.

* **Persistent Magic.** If the persistent magic is created by a 1st Circle spell or below, it is destroyed.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** The maximum spell Circle this spell can end increases by one.

* **(+3 INT and above)** You make a spellcasting combat check and set the maximum spell Circle this spell can end to either its current value or \[(the spellcasting check's total \- 10\) / 2\], whichever is higher. **Dispel** cannot end 7th Circle spell effects.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** When targeting a creature, you learn which spells are affecting the creature. You may then selectively end spells of your choosing and leave the remaining intact.

name: Dizziness
flavor: The floor becomes the ceiling which becomes the floor which becomes the ceiling...
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a **Quick-Wits** saving throw. On a failure, they are disoriented until this spell ends. At the end of an affected creature's turn, they may retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** The affected creature must take an action to retry the saving throw. This action may only be taken once per round.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You may target an additional creature within range.

name: Double Trouble
flavor: You intersperse the real you with an imaginary you as you fight in tandem.
description:
On the first attack made against you before this spell ends, you may roll a die of a size of your choice. On an even outcome, the attack automatically misses.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. If the attack hits, it deals an additional **3d8 psychic damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d10.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You now roll a die on the first two attacks made against you to determine if they automatically miss.

name: Dose of Reality
flavor: Illusory spells are no match for the unimaginative.
description:
You grant the following benefits to a target creature within range until this spell ends:

* **No Distractions.** You do not perceive effects with the **Illusion** spell trait as real.

* **Nothing Hidden.** Subjects with the invisible condition or its **Concealed** or **Stealthy** traits do not benefit from them against you.

name: Drowsiness
flavor: You begin to metronomically count upwards. A hypnosis as old as time itself.
description:
You cause up to three target creatures within range to become slowed. Creatures that are immune to being charmed are not affected by this spell.

**Drowsiness** effects have the **Out of It** condition trait, which means they end early for a creature if it takes any damage or if they are within another creature's Reach and that creature takes an action to shake them out of their stupor.

A creature under the effect of the **Drowsiness** spell incurs disadvantage on saving throws imposed by the **Sleep** spell.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You may target an additional creature within range.

name: Dusklit Dance
flavor: Draw the line between life and death.
description:
You make a weapon attack. If this attack hits, you may cause a target creature within range to **regain 2d4 ST**.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make another weapon attack. If this attack hits, it deals an additional **2d10 radiant damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 2d4 and its damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** The creature you cause to **regain ST** adds **2d6 radiant damage** to the damage dealt by their next attack that hits within the next 10 minutes.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

name: Earthen Wall
flavor: You awaken the local tectonics to raise a barrier of soil and stone.
description:
You create a wall that is 5 feet thick, 10 feet tall, and 30 feet wide whose endpoints are target surfaces within range. The wall may be bent and curved at your choosing, and may even be formed into a ring with an inner radius of 5 feet. Each 5 foot length section of the wall has 15 HP, an AC of 10, and 5 Toughness. Creatures are capable of climbing the wall.

When this spell ends, all sections of the wall crumble to dust.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above, Repeatable)** The wall's height is increased by 5 feet and its Toughness is increased by 5\.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The wall's length is increased by 30 feet and can be formed into a circle with a radius 5 feet longer. Each section's HP is also increased by 10\.

name: Empathic Barrier
flavor: The weight of action is impressed upon the wicked.
description:
You grant up to two target creatures within range the following benefits:

* **Excoriate.** When an attack hits the affected creature, the attacker is dealt **1d8 psychic damage**.

* **Hesitate.** After at least one attack hits each of the affected creatures, this spell is *upgraded* for all affected creatures until this spell ends. When an affected creature is attacked while this spell is upgraded, the attacker must take an additional action to make the attack.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d8.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's range becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** This spell may target an additional creature.

name: Errant Angle
flavor: The truth of position cut to ribbons.
description:
You push a target within range 5 feet away from you.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. If the attack hits, it deals an additional **3d8 slashing damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d10.

* **(+3 INT and above)** After the target is pushed, they become prone.

name: Erupting Flame
flavor: You cause a section of ground to slowly heat up before suddenly exploding with gouts of flame.
description:
You designate a 15 foot radius, 15 foot tall cylinder originating from a target surface within range. At the start of your next turn, all creatures and objects in the area must make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **2d6 fire damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** All unoccupied surface spaces in the area are set ablaze. Any creatures affected by this spell that fail the **Reflex** saving throw are also set ablaze.

name: Fan of Flames
flavor: A pyral fan of flames explodes out of the palms of your hands.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects in a cone in front of you whose length is the range of this spell to make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **3d6 fire damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 3d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's damage ignores DBs.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 40 feet.

name: Facsimispell
flavor: Often, the impression of a spell is all that is necessary.
description:
As you cast this spell, you choose an Arcane spell effect, and the casting of this spell appears identical to that of the chosen spell. You create a *facsimile* of the chosen spell. This spell's range and duration is equal to that of the chosen spell. The facsimile has the following properties:

* **Disillusioned.** The spell effect chosen for the facsimile must not already have the **Illusion** trait.

* **Non-Transformitive.** The facsimile cannot cause subjects to become invisible or polymorphed to achieve the appearance of its effect.

* **Unconvincing.** The **Illusion** trait of this spell only applies to creatures that would not be affected by the facsimile's spell effect. Creatures that would be affected by the facsimile's spell effect know it is not real.

* **No Heightening.** The facsimile acts as if it were cast at its baseline Circle.


**Illusion.** This spell effect is intangible but creatures perceive it as real until they attempt to physically interact with it. As an action, a creature that **perceives** this effect may make a **Quick-Wits** saving throw. On a success, the effect becomes obviously illusory to them.

name: Fissile Runes
flavor: You've learned to trace a fuse onto the weave itself.
description:
You make a weapon attack.

**Spellstrike.** You may use an additional action when this spell begins to make another weapon attack.

Both attacks have the following effects:

* **If it hits,** you bestow 1d4 of *volatile dice* onto the target.

At the end of the current turn, any creature that has volatile dice explodes and deals **force damage** to all creatures and objects within 5 feet of them equal to the total of their volatile dice. Afterwards, all volatile dice are discarded.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** When an attack hits, you bestow an additional 1d4 volatile die onto the target.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The volatile dice explode in a 15 foot radius.

name: Flit
flavor: You create a fleeting moment of rapid movement.
description:
You designate up to three target creatures within range and add 10 feet to their Speed until this spell ends. If an affected creature ends their turn having not moved since the start of their turn, this spell ends early for them.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above, Repeatable)** This spell grants an additional 5 feet to the Speed of all affected creatures.

name: Fog Cloud
flavor: You envelop an area in an opaque mist.
description:
You create a 15 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range filled with an opaque smoke that persists until this spell ends. Creatures are unable to perceive into or from the area using normal senses. The area is an intangible object that does not prevent other subjects from occupying its space and has 5 HP, an AC of 10, 0 Toughness, and immunity to all damage except **bludgeoning damage** dealt in an area. A strong wind may also dissipate the smoke. This spell ends if the area is broken.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** You may take an action once per round to move the centerpoint of the area up to 30 feet to a target location.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The radius of the area is increased by 5 feet and the smoke's HP is increased by 5\.

name: Fortify
flavor: Fluorescent adhesives suffuse through the material and bind it together.
description: You designate a target object within range with a Toughness of 20 or less. Until this spell ends, the target's Toughness is increased by 10\.

name: Frigid Gauntlet
flavor: Ice forms around your armaments as crystalline plating.
description:
You gain DB 5 against **physical damage** until this spell ends.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. If the attack hits, it deals an additional **3d8 cold damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** The DB gained from this spell increases by 5 and its damage roll increases by 2d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** Whenever this spell's DB is broken, you deal **1d8 cold damage** to all creatures and objects within your Reach.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's duration becomes 10 minutes.

name: Heal
flavor: Vermillion sparks flicker from the palm of your hand, igniting the process of regrowth.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to heal 1d8 HP.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's healing roll increases by 1d8.

name: Illusion
flavor: What you see is not always what you get.
description:
You designate a 10 foot cube originating at a target location within range and create a static image within the area that persists until this spell ends. The visual appearance of this image may take on any form of your choosing, but cannot create any sound or other sensory effect.

**Illusion.** This spell effect is intangible but creatures perceive it as real until they attempt to physically interact with it. As an action, a creature that **perceives** this effect may make a **Quick-Wits** saving throw. On a success, the effect becomes obviously illusory to them.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** The effect may now also include sounds and other sensory effects. These effects are perceptible outside of this spell's area.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The visual appearance may now be animated, though this animation must be determined when this spell begins. As an action, you may move the origin point of this spell's area up to 30 feet to a location you are **aware** of.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The side length of the cube increases by 10 feet. Additionally, you may cause the casting time of this spell to be 1 minute to multiply the resulting total side length by 3\.

name: Iron Skin
flavor: They can walk, but if they move, they might fall.
description:
You grant a target willing creature within range the following effects until this spell ends:

* **Alloyed.** They gain DB 10 against **physical damage**.

* **Conductive.** Once per turn when they take **lightning damage**, they and any creatures touching them (such as by being grappled or carried) are dealt an additional **5 lightning damage**.

* **Heavy.** Their Speed is reduced by 5 feet and they are unable to swim, climb, jump, or fly.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** An affected creature gains advantage on **Poise** saving throws and all STR combat checks made against an affected creature incur disadvantage.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's range becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** This spell's DB increases by 5\.

name: Kindling Light
flavor: Shed the shadow of death.
description:
You designate a 20 foot diameter, 120 foot tall cylinder originating from a target floor within range. All creatures in the area **regain 1d8 \+ 2 ST**. Additionally, an affected creature may take an action once before this spell ends to **regain 1d8 \+ 2 ST** again.

Whenever a creature regains ST from this spell, they are cleansed of the slowed condition.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** Both of this spell's ST recovery roll increase by 1d8 \+ 2\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** You may choose any number of creatures in this spell's area to be unaffected.

name: Life Ball
flavor: Ball is life.
description:
You conjure a *life ball* represented as a target 5 foot space within range that persists until this spell ends. Whenever an ally is within a life ball's space for the first time since the start of your most recent turn, they **regain 1d81d4 \+ 1 ST.**

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 1d81d4 \+ 1\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** If a life ball is within the Reach of an ally, they may take an action to relocate the life ball to a new 5 foot space they target within this spell's range of them.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You conjure an additional life ball at a target 5 foot space within range.

name: Lightning Bolt
flavor: With fluid motion you channel a bolt of lightning to strike with violent precision.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects in a 5 foot wide line whose length is the range of this spell to make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **2d8 lightning damage**. 

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you may bend the area's line at one point along the line to any angle or direction you choose.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** You bend the area's line at a point along the line to any angle or direction you choose.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

name: Listener Glyph
flavor: You inscribe a sigil that quickly fades, leaving behind an imperceptible mark through which you may listen in when the time is right.
description:
You create a *listener glyph* at a target unoccupied surface space, a Tiny object with 5 HP, 15 AC, and 5 Toughness until this spell ends. The listener glyph is invisible and stuck onto the target surface.

**Sensor.** This spell trait activates when a certain *trigger* is met, and when this spell begins, you may except any number of creatures from triggering this spell. For this spell, the trigger is a word or phrase you choose when this spell begins, and this spell trait activates when the chosen word or phrase is spoken by a creature within 60 feet of the designated surface. When this trait activates, you are notified this occurred.

**Scrying.** As an action, you may choose an object created by this spell and begin perceiving as if you were located at it. As a free action, you may end this effect. While perceiving in this manner, you are only able to hear.

name: Lucent Flare
flavor: You produce a glimmer of an undeniable, irradiant truth.
description:
You create a 15 foot radius sphere originating from a location within range you are at least aware of (even through obstructions). All creatures and objects must make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **2d6 radiant damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 30 feet.

name: Missive
flavor: Dear esteemed colleague: I apologize for diverting your attention from your critical studies. Your predilection towards explosive spells yields incredible promise. However, it is absolutely imperative that I tell you-
description: You compose a message of 30 words or less and choose a creature that you know. You then conjure a note with the message written on it at the chosen creature's location.

name: Molasses Missile
flavor: A meandering bubble of sizzling toxic goo that does not stop, does not sleep, and will always chase down its target to the ends of the earth.
description:
You designate a target within range and create a *molasses missile* at your location that persists until this spell ends. At the end of each of your turns, the molasses missile travels 15 feet along the shortest path to the designated target. If no path exists, the molasses missile instead travels directly towards the target and impacts any obstruction on its path. Upon collision with the target or obstruction, the molasses missile deals **4d10 poison damage** and this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage die increases by 4d10.

* **(+3 INT and above, Repeatable)** The molasses missile now can dissolve through material while traveling at the same pace towards the target. It only stops if it collides with the target or an object with Toughness greater than 5\. Choosing this enhancement multiple times increases the maximum Toughness by 5 for each selection after the first.

name: Never Mind
flavor: Please ignore that.
description: You may choose for the casting of this spell to be imperceptible. You may cast this spell as a reaction immediately after saying something up to the length of a sentence. You cause a target creature to make a **Will** saving throw. You do not learn the total of the check. On a failure, an affected creature forgets what you said. On a success, they learn that you cast this spell on them.

name: Palefire Scourge
flavor: A devouring, vacant flame catches hold and singes the soul.
description:
You deal **1d8 necrotic damage** to a target creature within range. Once per turn until this spell ends, you may deal **1d8 necrotic damage** to an affected creature after they burn a Resolve or when one of their weaknesses activates.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. If this attack hits an affected creature, it deals an additional **1d8 necrotic damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** Each of this spell's damage rolls increase by 1d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** Choose one of the following damage types: **acid**, **fire**, or **force**. All damage dealt by this spell is converted to the chosen damage type.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's duration becomes 10 minutes but requires concentration.

name: Pearlescent Cable
duration: Until the end of your next long rest
flavor: Raw magic congealed into a glistening chain perfectly suited for joining two things together.
description: You conjure a *pearlescent cable*, a 15 foot long cable attached to one or two target surfaces within range that persists until this spell ends. The pearlescent cable is a Small object with 15 HP, 10 AC, and 10 Toughness, and it remains attached to the target surfaces until it is destroyed. This spell ends early if it is destroyed.

name: Phosphorescence
flavor: You coat an area with a faint, colorful glow.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects in a 15 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range to be unable to gain the benefits of the invisible condition until this spell ends. Additionally, when you cast this spell, all affected creatures must make a **Reflex** saving throw. On a failure, all attacks made against them also gain advantage until this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The radius of the area becomes 10 feet.

name: Poison Needles
flavor: You throw a barrage of envenomed needles.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects in a cone in front of you whose length is the range of this spell to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **2d8 poison damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** On a failure, an affected creature is poisoned until the end of its next turn.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You create a second cone originating from your location whose length is the range of this spell. A creature or object cannot be affected by an instance of this spell more than once.

name: Rallying Cry
flavor: Get up\! Get up, damn you\!
description:
You cause any number of creatures of your choosing within range to **regain 1d6 \+ 1 ST** and cease being prone.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you double the amount of ST regained for all affected creatures.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 1d6 \+ 1\.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The range of this spell becomes 30 feet.

name: Rectify Imperfection
duration: 10 Minutes or until you cast this spell again
flavor: Minor flaws in the process and materials can cause suboptimal weight distributions within a weapon.
description:
You choose a target weapon within range. All weapon attacks made with that weapon have their critical hit threshold reduced by 1 until this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's critical hit threshold reduction increases to 2\.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You target an additional weapon within range.

name: Riftwalk
flavor: In a flash, you stride between the trappings of physicality.
description:
You teleport to a target unoccupied space within range.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above, Repeatable)** The range of this spell increases by 15 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You may bring a target willing creature within your Reach with you, teleporting them with you.

name: Sanguine Sliver
flavor: You throw a coiled spike that channels out life forces from its mark.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **3d6 piercing damage**. On a failure, you may cause a different target creature within range to **regain ST** equal to the amount of damage taken from this spell.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 3d6.

name: Sever Senses
flavor: A piercing delusion cuts the passage between perception and knowledge.
description:
You make a weapon attack.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make another weapon attack.

Both attacks have the following effects:

* **If it hits**, the target is disoriented until the end of its next turn.

* **If it hits a target that is already disoriented**, the attack deals an additional **2d8 psychic damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** If a target is dealt **psychic damage** by this spell, it also incurs disadvantage on its next **Quick-Wits** saving throw before the end of its next turn.

name: Shard of Memory
flavor: A crystallization of a memory, forever stable and unchanging.
description:
You create a *shard of memory*, preserving everything you can **perceive** in your immediate surroundings in a Tiny object with 5 HP, 15 AC, and 5 Toughness that persists until this spell ends. The contents of the shard of memory may be an instantaneous moment or up to 6 seconds of experiences. This spell ends early if it is destroyed.

As an action while holding a shard of memory, a creature may **perceive** the contents of the shard as if they were at the time and place the shard of memory was created.

name: Slick Ice
flavor: You create a slippery field of condensed, frozen dew.
description:
You create a 20 foot square area originating from a target location within range that persists until this spell ends. The area is considered difficult terrain unless, and on the first time a creature travels into a space covered by the area since the start of the current turn, it must make a **Reflex** saving throw. On a failure, a creature falls prone.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The side length of the square becomes 10 feet.

name: Slippery Form
duration: Until the end of your next long rest
flavor: You channel the adaptability, swiftness, and sliminess of a frog.
description:
Until this spell ends, you gain the following benefits:

* **Amphibious.** You are able to breathe underwater.

* **Mobilities.** You gain basic Jumping and Swimming mobility.

* **Slippery.** Grapple checks made against you incur disadvantage.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** Additionally, you gain basic Climbing mobility until this spell ends.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** All mobilities you gain from this spell are advanced.

name: Smoldering Crown
flavor: A damned crown of flames for thee.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a basic **Will** saving throw to resist **2d6 fire damage.** On a failure, the creature is *crowned* by this spell until this spell ends. On each of your future turns, as a free action, you may deal **2d10 fire damage** to creatures crowned by this spell provided you can target them within the range of this spell.

**Contagion.** As a reaction when a creature affected by a spell effect with contagion trait dies, is knocked out, or burns a Resolve, you may cause a different target creature within range to become affected by the spell as if it had failed the saving throw. Newly affected creatures are not dealt the initial damage.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's initial damage roll increases by 2d6 and the crowned damage roll increases by 1d10.

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's damage ignores DBs.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You target two creatures within range.

name: Soulburst
flavor: Your soul erupts in a conflagration of wishful flame.
description:
You deal **1d6 fire damage** to yourself and cause all other creatures and objects in a 20 foot radius sphere originating from you to make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **2d10 fire damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's self damage roll increases by 1d6 and the area damage roll increases by 2d10.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area increases to 30 feet.

name: Starfire Cluster
flavor: You initiate a wondrous dance of dazzling starfire.
description:
You create three *stars* and distribute them amongst yourself and allied creatures within 15 feet of you. Until this spell ends, a creature with a star may take an action to expend it, add 10 feet to their movement pool, and cause a creature or object they target within this spell's range of them to make a basic **Quick-Wits** saving throw (using your Spell Save DC) to resist **2d8 radiant damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d8.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** You may distribute the stars to allied creatures within 30 feet of you.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You create an additional star.

name: Subzero Spiker
flavor: A wizard's best friend: portable frigid spike grenade.
description:
You summon a *subzero spiker* at a target unoccupied space within range that persists until this spell ends. The subzero spiker is a Tiny object with 15 HP, 15 AC, 5 Toughness, immunity to **cold damage**, advanced Hovering mobility, and a Speed of 15 feet. This spell ends early if it is destroyed.

**Automaton.** You may issue the *commands* listed below to an object of your choice created by this spell by taking its listed kind of action. Each command may only be performed once per round:

* **Ice Blast (action).** You deal **1d8 cold damage** to all creatures and objects within 15 feet of the subzero spiker.

* **Move (free action during your turn).** The subzero spiker travels up to its Speed.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** The subzero spiker's HP increases by 15, its Toughness increases by 5, and this spell's damage roll increases by 1d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's damage ignores DBs.

name: Telepathic Bond
duration: Until the end of your next short or long rest
flavor: With the bonds we form, we are never too far from another.
description: You designate any number of target creatures within range. Until this spell ends, any of the affected creatures may telepathically communicate with any other creature affected by this spell that is within 1 mile.

name: Tempering Flame
flavor: Through effort alone greatness can be realized.
description:
You make a weapon attack.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make another weapon attack.

Both attacks have the following effects:

* **If it hits,** the attack's damage is converted to **fire damage** and deals an additional **1d8 fire damage** to the target.

* **If both attacks hit**, you may choose to extend the duration of this spell to 10 minutes and concentrate on it. If you do, you gain the following effects:

  * Whenever you hit with a weapon attack before this spell ends, you convert all of the attack's damage to **fire damage**.

  * The range of your melee weapon attacks is increased by 5 feet.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** While you are concentrating on this spell, your weapon attacks have their critical hit threshold reduced by 1\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** While you are concentrating on this spell, the increase in range of your melee weapon attacks becomes 15 feet.

name: Temporary Truce
flavor: Can everyone just stop for a second?
description: You cause any number of target creatures within range to become pacified until this spell ends. If an affected creature perceives another creature doing anything hostile, such as attacking, grappling, or casting a harmful spell, this spell ends early.

name: Tidal Blessing
flavor: A deluge of refreshing sea foam washes away the weight of misery.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to **regain 4d6 \+ 4 ST** and become cleansed of the ablaze condition. Additionally, the target is immune to the ablaze condition until this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 4d6 \+ 4\.

name: Transmutation Barrier
flavor: You create a twisting barrier that turns arrows into doves.
description:
You create a 10 foot square originating from a target location within range that persists until this spell ends. The square typically stands upright but may be oriented however you wish. Any ranged weapon attack that targets through the square is *intercepted* and automatically misses. After intercepting five attacks, this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** The square may now intercept ranged special attacks and ranged spell attacks.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The square may intercept eight attacks before it ends.

name: Unraveling Mark
flavor: Threads pulling threads pulling threads pulling...
description:
You cause a target within range to be dealt an additional **1d8 force damage** on the next three attacks that hit it before this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d8.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The target is dealt the damage for two additional attacks that hit it before this spell ends.

name: Warding Circle
duration: Until the end of your next short or long rest
flavor: A ring of salt and hallowed flame marking where the unwanted may not trespass.
description:
You designate a 15 foot radius, 30 foot tall cylinder originating from a target floor within range and then designate a creature type tag. Until this spell ends, a creature with a creature type tag designated by this spell may not willingly move into the area.

**Permanence.** When this spell begins, you may expend a Resource to cause this spell's duration to become Indefinite.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** Creatures with a creature type tag designated by this spell may now enter the area, but may not willingly move out of the area. This spell's duration becomes 10 minutes.

* **(+3 WIS and above, Repeatable)** You may designate an additional creature type tag.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The radius of the area increases by 5 feet. If you are using this spell's **Permanence** spell trait, this enhancement instead doubles each dimension.

name: Wildfire Strike
flavor: Streaks of flame erupt from your weapons with ashen might.
description:
You set all surface spaces and creatures ablaze in a 5 foot wide line in front of you whose length is the range of this spell.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. If the attack hits a target that is ablaze, it deals an additional **2d4 fire damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d4.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 30 feet.

name: Withering Cull
flavor: You grab hold of an enemy and call it to its death.
description:
You cause a target creature or object within range to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **4d10 necrotic damage**. If the target currently has no Resolve, they incur disadvantage on the saving throw from this spell.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 4d10.

name: Witty Retort
flavor: You may win the fight, but I will win the argument.
description:
You may cast this spell as a reaction when a target within range hits you with an attack. The target must make a basic **Quick-Wits** saving throw to resist **4d6 psychic damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 4d6.

# **List of 2nd Circle Spells**

name: Accelerate
flavor: You envision the vast and uncountable possibilities that expand from this very moment. For you, it all falls into place at exactly the right time.
description:
You allow a target creature within range to take a free Move action.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** On the first and third time this enhancement is chosen, you target an additional creature within range.

name: Bitter Finality
flavor: You know how it all ends. The long draw to emptiness. A future devoid of warmth.
description:
You cause a target within range to become slowed until this spell ends. This spell ends early if you are ever further than this spell's range from the harrowed target.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. If the attack hits a target slowed by this spell, it deals an additional **6d8 cold damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 3d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** If a target is dealt **cold damage** by this spell, it becomes stuck until either the end of its next turn or when this spell ends.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell increases to 60 feet.

name: Branch Out
flavor: You make like a tree and beat your opponents from afar.
description:
You grow two additional *vine arms* that are attached to and usable by your body that persist until this spell ends. While using your vine arms, your Reach is increased by 5 feet. Additionally, whenever you succeed on a Grapple or Pin check using your vine arms, the target of the action takes **2d4 piercing damage**.

When this spell ends, your vine arms drop all objects they were holding and release all creatures and objects grappled or restrained by them.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d4.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The Reach bonus gained from using your vine arms becomes 10 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You grow an additional vine arm.

name: Cindering Oath
flavor: A solemn vow spoken in the tongue of flame: burn bright and burn beautifully.
description:
Until this spell ends, you gain the following benefits:

* **Conflagration.** When this spell ends, you are set ablaze.

* **Ferocity.** All attack checks you make gain advantage.

* **Flint Strikes.** Whenever you hit a creature or object with an attack twice within a single turn, the target is set ablaze.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 CHA and above)** When this spell ends, you may choose to set all surface spaces within 10 feet of you ablaze.

name: Circle of Renewal
flavor: The bolstering strength of those around you amplifies your recovery.
description:
You designate up to three target creatures within range. As an action once per round until this spell ends, you may cause all targets to **regain 2d6 \+ 2 ST**. If at the end of any turn during combat all affected creatures are within 5 feet of another affected creature, this spell is *upgraded* for all affected creatures.

While this spell is upgraded, an affected creature may ignore effects that prevent them from regaining ST and this spell's ST recovery roll increases by 1d6.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 1st, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 1d6 \+ 1\.

name: Compound Deconstruction
flavor: This particular flavor of alchemy is classified as "quantifiable disaster."
description:
You make a weapon attack.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make another weapon attack.

Both attacks have the following effects:

* **If the target has previously taken acid damage this turn**, the attack gains advantage.

* **If it hits,** you deal **2d6 acid damage** to the target and all creatures and objects in a 5 foot wide, 10 foot long line originating from the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll for each attack increases by 1d6.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The line's length becomes 20 feet.

name: Counterspell
flavor: As a spell is being formed, you upset it with an equal but opposite force.
description:
Immediately after a target within range casts a spell, but before the spell begins, you may cast **Counterspell** as a reaction. The spell the target just cast is called the *target spell*, and **Counterspell's** effect is determined by the Circle of the target spell:

* **2nd Circle or Below.** If the target spell is less than or equal to 2nd Circle, the target spell ends and produces no effect.

* **Above 2nd Circle.** If the target spell is greater than 2nd Circle, you must make a spellcasting combat check against a DC equal to 10 \+ (2 x the Circle of the target spell). On a success, the target spell ends and produces no effect.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above, Repeatable)** The maximum target spell Circle where this spell automatically succeeds increases by one.

* **(+3 WIS and above, Repeatable)** The range of this spell increases by 30 feet.

name: Double Jump
flavor: It really is that simple.
description:
You grant up to three target creatures within range basic Jumping mobility until this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** You instead grant advanced Jumping mobility to all affected creatures.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You target an additional creature within range.

name: Earthen Affinity
flavor: Unbroken by tide, quake, and storm, you and the mountain are one and the same.
description:
Until this spell ends, you gain the following benefits:

* **Wall Cling.** You gain advanced Climbing mobility.

* **Stone Skin.** You gain DB 5 against **physical damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above, Repeatable)** Until this spell ends, you additionally gain basic Burrowing mobility. Choosing this enhancement twice grants advanced Burrowing mobility.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** This spell's DB increases by 5\.

name: Echoing Blast
flavor: You conjure a circulation of deadly sound waves.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects in a 15 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist an initial **2d10 bludgeoning damage**. At the start of your next turn, you deal **2d8 bludgeoning damage** to all creatures and objects in the area.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:
