* **(Repeatable)** This spell's initial damage roll increases by 1d10 and its delayed damage roll increases by 1d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's damage ignores DBs.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 25 feet.

name: Electric Tomb
flavor: You enshackle an enemy with filamentary lightning.
description:
You cause a target within range to make a basic **Will** saving throw to resist **4d8 lightning damage**. Additionally, if the target moves out of its current space before this spell ends, it is dealt an additional **4d8 lightning damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** Both of this spell's damage rolls increase by 4d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's damage ignores DBs.

name: Enervate
flavor: You impose a withering frailness upon a foe's vigor.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a **Fortitude** saving throw. On a failure, an affected creature incurs disadvantage on all STR combat and effort checks and halves the damage dealt by all weapon attacks they make while using melee or Thrown fighting styles.

At the end of an affected creature's turn, they may retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's saving throw DC is increased by 2\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You may target an additional creature within range.

name: Equivalent Exchange
flavor: Elemental energies cannot be created nor destroyed; they merely change form.
description:
You designate a target ally within range. Until this spell ends, whenever the target takes elemental damage, you may take a reaction to convert the elemental damage inflicted to a different elemental damage type of your choosing.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** When you take this spell's reaction, you may convert the inflicted elemental damage to a physical damage type of your choosing.

name: Fear
flavor: You don a visage of pure amorphic horror.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a **Courage** saving throw. On a failure, a creature is frightened of you until this spell ends. When a creature frightened from this spell starts their turn, they must also choose one of the following penalties to apply to themselves for the turn:

* **Fight.** The creature must take the Attack action against you this turn. The next attack against the creature gains advantage.

* **Flight.** The creature attempts to end its turn further away from you by at least an amount equal to its Speed.

* **Freeze.** The creature is stuck until the end of their turn.

At the end of an affected creature's turn, they may retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's saving throw DC is increased by 2\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You may target an additional creature within range.

name: Fireball
flavor: A white hot point of light explodes into destructive flames.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects in a 20 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range to make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **4d8 fire damage**.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you cause all creatures that failed the saving throw as well as all objects and unoccupied surface spaces in this spell's area to be set ablaze.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d8.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 30 feet.

name: Gnarled Garden
flavor: A mass of knotted overgrowth envelopes the battlefield, bearing fruit to those you wish to protect.
description:
You designate a 30 foot cube originating from a target location within range that persists until this spell ends. All surface spaces within the cube are difficult terrain. Additionally, once per round until this spell ends, you may take an action to cause a target creature in the cube to **regain 4d6 \+ 4 ST**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 2d6 \+ 2\.

* **(+3 INT and above)** Creatures of your choosing may ignore the difficult terrain caused by this spell.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** When you take the action for this spell to grant ST recovery, you may move the origin of the cube up to 15 feet to a new target location within range. This movement of the cube may occur before or after granting the ST recovery.

name: Herald of Defiance
flavor: When the forces of life and death overflow, you are there to turn back the tide.
description:
You grant up to three target allies within range DB 5 against **radiant** and **necrotic damage** until this spell ends. When an affected creature is dealt **necrotic damage**, the source of the damage is dealt **5 radiant damage**. Likewise, when an affected creature is dealt **radiant damage**, the source of the damage is dealt **5 necrotic damage**. 

A creature may be dealt damage by **Herald of Defiance** at most once per turn.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** Both this spell's DB and its damage increase by 5\.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You target an additional creature within range.

name: High Five
flavor: An ancient spell, first cast by the realest of them all.
description:
You add your Speed to your movement pool. Until this spell ends, you may take a free action to cause a target creature within range that has yet to be affected by this spell to **regain 4d4 \+ 4 ST**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 2d4 \+ 2\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The movement gained from this spell is doubled.

name: Ice Spires
flavor: Spires of ice pierce the earth and partially freeze those nearby.
description:
You create four *spires*, each of which appears in a target unoccupied 5 foot space within range and persists until this spell ends. A spire is a 15 foot tall Medium object that has 15 HP, an AC of 15 and a Toughness of 5\. Creatures and objects that start their turn within 5 feet of a spire are slowed until the end of its turn.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You create two additional spires.

name: Inescapable Sight
flavor: Let it be known. Let I be known.
description:
You create a 20 foot radius sphere originating from a location within range you are at least aware of (even through obstructions). All creatures and objects must make a basic **Will** saving throw to resist **4d6 psychic damage**. Additionally, you are aware of all subjects in this spell's area until the end of your next turn.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you double the radius of the sphere and negate all of the **psychic damage** this spell would have dealt.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 30 feet.

name: Invisibility
flavor: You make someone or something disappear.
description:
You cause a target within range to become invisible until this spell ends. If an affected creature attempts to inflict damage, apply a condition, or force another creature to make a saving throw in any way, this spell ends for them afterwards.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** Attempting to inflict damage, apply a condition, or force another creature to make a saving throw in any way no longer ends this spell.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's duration becomes 1 hour.

name: Levitate
flavor: You unshackle the constraints of gravity.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects in a 10 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range to make a **Poise** saving throw. Subjects of size Large gain advantage on this saving throw, and subjects of size Huge or larger automatically succeed. On a failure, a subject is suspended 10 feet away from the surface nearest to it and ceases to be affected by gravity until this spell ends.

An affected subject is weightless and may only travel by their own volition when a solid surface is within their Reach. If they kick off of a surface, they may attain a velocity equal to half their Speed traveling in a straight line every round.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The radius of the area increases by 5 feet.

name: Lightstream Chaser
flavor: Nestled between the impossible is a slim opportunity which only light is quick enough to reach.
description:
You make a weapon attack.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make another weapon attack.

Both attacks have the following effects:

* **Before making the attack,** you teleport to a target unoccupied space within range from which you are able to target a creature with a weapon attack.

* **If it hits,** the attack deals an additional **2d8 radiant damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d8.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 30 feet.

name: Lucidity
flavor: You break the clouding of senses with piercing clarity.
description:
You designate a 15 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range. All creatures in the area **regain 2d6 \+ 2 ST** and are both cleansed of and immune to being disoriented until this spell ends.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you double the amount of ST regained for all affected creatures.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 1d6 \+ 1\.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 25 feet.

name: Parting Gift
flavor: You snap your fingers and make a loud exit.
description:
You and a willing creature of your choice within your Reach may teleport up to a target unoccupied space within range. Immediately afterwards, you may choose a different target creature or object within 10 feet of your original position to make a basic **Poise** saving throw to resist **8d6 bludgeoning damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 4d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** If the target of this spell's damage fails the saving throw, they are pulled to your original position.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

name: Resistance
flavor: Steeled for the darkest hour.
description:
You designate a 15 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range. All creatures in the area **regain 2d6 \+ 2 ST** and gain advantage on the next saving throw they make before this spell ends.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you double the amount of ST regained for all affected creatures.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 1d6 \+ 1\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** You may choose any number of creatures in this spell's area to be unaffected.

name: Reunmagnification
flavor: Conservation of magnification dictates an equilibrium despite your attempts to disturb it.
description:
You cause a target within range to make a **Fortitude** saving throw. Objects of Size Medium or smaller automatically fail this saving throw. On a failure, two things occur:

* **Unlarge.** The target becomes one Size smaller until this spell ends.

* **Enlarge.** You cause a second target within range to become one Size larger until this spell ends.

name: Shatter
flavor: All things must crumble before they can be rebuilt.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects within a 15 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **4d6 bludgeoning damage**. Objects and constructs in the area take double the amount of damage from this spell.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 30 feet.

name: Siphon Sign
flavor: The mark of famine, inverted.
description:
You designate a target creature within range. Until this spell ends, whenever the designated creature is hit with an attack, the attacker **regains 6 ST.**

**Contagion.** As a reaction when a creature affected by a spell effect with contagion trait dies, is knocked out, or burns a Resolve, you may cause a different target creature within range to become affected by the spell.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery per hit increases by 3\.

name: Skittering Saboteur
flavor: So light, you can barely feel it creep up your shoulder.
description:
You conjure a *skittering saboteur* at a target unoccupied within range that persists until this spell ends. The skittering saboteur is a Tiny object with 15 HP, 18 AC, 0 Toughness, advanced Climbing mobility, and a Speed of 30 feet. This spell ends early if it is destroyed.

**Automaton.** You may issue the *commands* listed below to an object of your choice created by this spell by taking its listed kind of action. Each command may only be performed once per round:

* **Detonate (reaction at any point).** You destroy the skittering saboteur and cause all subjects within 15 feet of it to make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **4d8 acid damage**.

* **Move (free action during your turn).** The skittering saboteur travels up to its Speed.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** The skittering saboteur's HP increases by 15, its AC increases by 1, and this spell's damage roll increases by 2d8.

name: Sleep
flavor: You close the gap between worlds of the real and those of dreams. It beckons many to cross.
description:
You cause all creatures in a 15 foot diameter sphere originating from a target location within range to make a **Will** saving throw. A creature gains a degree of advantage on the saving throw for each Resolve they have remaining. Features that alter a creature's susceptibility to being charmed also apply to saving throws imposed by **Sleep**. On a failure, a creature falls prone and unconscious.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The diameter of the area becomes 10 feet.

name: Spears of Retribution
flavor: You draw out the vile malice plaguing your party and turn it against your foes.
description:
You designate up to three target creatures within range that are either poisoned, frightened, or incapacitated and cleanse those conditions off of the targets. For each creature you cleanse one or more conditions from, you may cause a different unique target within range to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **2d6 necrotic damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** The target(s) chosen to make a saving throw to avoid damage no longer need to be unique. When choosing a target multiple times, they make one basic saving throw to resist a combined damage roll.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's range becomes 120 feet.

name: Spike Growth
flavor: A minefield of thorns and spikes covers the land.
description:
You designate a 20 foot radius sphere originating from a target surface within range that persists until this spell ends. All surface spaces in the area are considered difficult terrain. For every 5 feet a creature travels through a surface space within this spell's area, you deal **2d4 piercing damage** to them.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d4.

* **(+3 INT and above)** When you cast this spell, you may designate any amount of surface spaces in the area to be excluded from effect of this spell.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 40 feet.

name: Spore Plume
flavor: You join the fungal chorus\!
description:
You create a 15 foot diameter sphere originating from a target location within range filled with an opaque cloud that persists until this spell ends. Creatures other than you are unable to perceive into or out of the area using normal senses. The cloud is an intangible object that does not prevent other subjects from occupying its space and has 5 HP, an AC of 10, 0 Toughness, and immunity to all damage except **bludgeoning damage** dealt in an area. A strong wind may also dissipate the cloud. This spell ends if the cloud is broken.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. If the attack hits a creature in the cloud, it deals an additional **4d8 poison damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d8.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** Your allies are able to perceive into or out of the area using normal senses.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The diameter of this spell's area increases by 10 feet.

name: Storm Stride
flavor: Gusts and tempest collect beneath your feet \- thunder and lightning with every footfall.
description:
Until this spell ends, you gain the following benefits:

* **Current.** Once per turn, your first attack that hits after moving in the same turn deals an additional **2d4 lightning damage** to the target of the attack.

* **Flow.** Your Speed is doubled.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d4.

name: Summon Piano
flavor: And now, the grand finale\!
description:
You conjure a *piano* at a target location within range that persists until this spell ends. The piano is a Large object with 30 HP, 10 AC, and 5 Toughness. This spell ends if it is destroyed. You gain advantage on CHA checks performed while playing the piano. If the piano falls, all creatures and objects underneath it, as well as the piano itself, must make a basic **Poise** saving throw to resist **4d6 bludgeoning damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You summon a pipe organ instead, which increases its Size to Huge with 40 HP, 5 AC, and 15 Toughness.

name: Tempest Shield
flavor: Shimmering storms gather into a protective shield as the planting of your feet resound with rolling thunder.
description:
You take a free Raise Shield action. You may also materialize and hold a shield to qualify to take the Raise Shield action, which persists while you gain the benefits of the action. Until this spell ends, whenever a creature or object is within range for the first time since the start of your most recent turn, you may deal **6 lightning damage** to them.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. If the attack hits, it deals an additional **2d6 lightning damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's area damage roll increases by 3 and its bonus weapon damage roll increases by 1d6.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** When this spell begins, you may travel up to half your Speed immediately. This may be done before using the **Spellstrike** trait.

name: Toxic Fume
flavor: I must have smelt it.
description:
You cause all creatures in a 15 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range to make a **Fortitude** saving throw. On a failure, a creature is poisoned until this spell ends. At the end of an affected creature's turn, they may retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The radius of the area increases by 5 feet.

name: Translocate
flavor: It is speculated that, in reality, memory-transfer and transmogrification are the actual mechanisms.
description:
You teleport to a target unoccupied space within range. Alternatively, you may target a willing creature within range that is your Size and swap places with them.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** You may instead target an unwilling creature within range.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The teleportation does not happen immediately and this spell's duration becomes 10 minutes. When this spell ends (such as by dismissing it), you teleport to the target space or its nearest unoccupied space if occupied.

name: Venomous Malaise
flavor: Writhe within the confines of your frail composure.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a **Fortitude** saving throw. On a failure, this spell beginsyou bestow a *malaise pool* of 5d8 to the target. As a free action once during each of your turns, you may deal **poison damage** to eachthe affected creature equal to a rolling of their malaise pool. Afterwards, malaise dice are retained in their pool unless their outcome was a 6, 7, or 8 (in which case they are discarded).

**Contagion.** As a reaction when a creature affected by a spell effect with contagion trait dies, is knocked out, or burns a Resolve, you may cause a different target creature within range to become affected by the spell as if it had failed the saving throw. Doing so refills the malaise pool.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** The malaise pool begins with an additional 2d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** While affected by this spell, a creature is also poisoned. Removal or immunity to the condition also ends this spell.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** Malaise dice are only discarded when their outcome is an 8\.

name: Vital Wellspring
flavor: You flood a creature with restorative vigor.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to become cleansed of the poisoned condition and gain a *wellspring pool* of 6d8 that persists until either the pool is emptied or this spell ends. At the start of each of the target creature's turns, they may roll their wellspring pool and **regain ST** equal to the total.

If a die's outcome from the wellspring pool is a 7 or 8, the wellspring pool loses 1d8 on subsequent rollings.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's initial wellspring pool increases by 3d8.

name: Web
flavor: You lob a blob of spider silk that explodes into a blast of sticky webs.
description:
A 10 foot radius sphere originating from a target surface within range becomes covered in a sticky web until this spell ends. The area is considered difficult terrain, and on the first time a creature or object travels into a space covered by the area since the start of the current turn, it must make a **Poise** saving throw. On a failure, a creature becomes stuck.

A creature stuck by this spell may take an action to retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The radius of the area increases by 5 feet.

# **List of 3rd Circle Spells**

name: Acid Jetblades
flavor: You sling jetstreams of acid that can cut through solid steel.
description:
You cause a target within range to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **12d8 acid damage**. On a failure, the target's AC is reduced to their Base AC and all incoming attacks have their critical strike threshold reduced by 2 until this spell ends.

If the target is an object and has Toughness 15 or below, you are able to slice cleanly through it in any fashion of your choosing as if you had automatically succeeded on a Wreck an Object action.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 4d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** The maximum object Toughness this spell may break increases to 20\.

name: Ascendant Wings
flavor: Flaming wings sprout from your backs and carry you aloft.
description:
You grant basic Flying mobility to up to three target allies within range until this spell ends. If at any point all affected creatures become more than 30 feet above the ground, this spell is *upgraded* for all affected creatures until this spell ends.

While this spell is upgraded and an affected creature is more than 30 feet above the ground, they may take an action to fall down to the ground, take no falling damage, and cause all other creatures and objects within 10 feet of them to make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **3d6 fire damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d6.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** You grant all affected creatures advanced Flying mobility.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You target an additional creature within range.

name: Carve Essence
flavor: You call upon the souls around you, draw one forth, and strike true.
description:
You choose a creature you are aware of within range and **perceive** them until this spell ends, negating the **Concealed** condition trait of invisible or other features. 

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. The attack gains the following benefits:

* The attack's range is the range of this spell.

* The attack may target the chosen creature even if the targeting path is obstructed.

* All of the attack's damage is converted to **necrotic**.

* If the attack hits, it deals an additional **9d8 necrotic damage** to the target.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 3d8.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

name: Collapsing Vortex
flavor: The original spellbook's footnote read: "Do Not Create The Collapsing Vortex".
description:
You cause all creatures and objects in a 30 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range to make a basic **Poise** saving throw to resist **6d8 force damage**. On a failure, an affected creature is pulled to the center of the area as closely as possible. For the purposes of determining the order of movement, creatures nearer to the center are affected before creatures farther from the center.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d8.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 45 feet.

name: Crystalline Sentinel
flavor: You conjure an amalgam of quartz and magic to ward off hostile spells.
description:
You conjure a *crystalline sentinel* at a target unoccupied space within range that persists until this spell ends. The crystalline sentinel is a Small object with 45 HP, 19 AC, 0 Toughness, advanced Hovering mobility, and a Speed of 30 feet. This spell ends early if it is destroyed.

**Automaton.** You may issue the *commands* listed below to an object of your choice created by this spell by taking its listed kind of action. Each command may only be performed once per round:

* **Counterspell (free action).** When you perceive a target cast a spell, you may cause the crystalline sentinel to cast **Counterspell** at 2nd Circle as a free action using your spellcasting modifier targeting the caster. Once the crystalline sentinel casts **Counterspell** three times, it is destroyed and this spell ends early.

* **Move (free action during your turn).** The crystalline sentinel travels up to its Speed.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above, Repeatable)** The crystalline sentinel casts **Counterspell** at one Circle higher.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The crystalline sentinel may cast **Counterspell** one additional time before this spell ends.

name: Dawn
flavor: Vampires hate this one spell\!
description:
You cause all creatures and objects within a 30 foot radius, 60 foot tall cylinder originating from a target surface within range to make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **6d6 radiant damage**. Additionally, the area is considered to be filled with sunlight until this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

name: DР“В©jР“В  Vwoop
flavor: You forcibly push back a creature's thought process by six seconds.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a basic **Quick-Wits** saving throw to resist **12d6 psychic damage**. On a failure, during the target's next turn, they must repeat an action of your choosing that they performed on their previous turn. If the creature has not taken a turn yet, they instead must take a Move action to travel up to their Speed in the direction they came from or away from where you entered the combat.

If the creature has not taken a turn yet, this additional effect does not occur.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 4d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** On a failed save, the target repeats an action that you have already taken during this turn rather than an action they took.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

name: Dauntless Pledge
flavor: The greatest evils amount unchallenged. Through fear, they fester.
description:
You cause any number of creatures of your choosing within range to **regain 3d6 \+ 3 ST** and become immune to being frightened until this spell ends.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you double the amount of ST regained for all affected creatures.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 1d6 \+ 1\.

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's **Expound** trait cannot be activated and may only target one creature. The amount of ST recovery granted from this spell is doubled.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The range of this spell becomes 30 feet.

name: Enthralling Performance
flavor: You hold a captive audience, awestruck by the sheer wonder of it all.
description:
All creatures in a 30 foot cube originating at a target location within range must make a **Will** saving throw. On a failure, an affected creature is charmed by you and incapacitated until this spell ends. A creature immune to being charmed is unaffected by **Enthralling Performance**.

**Enthralling Performance** effects have the **Out of It** condition trait, which means they end early for a creature if it takes any damage or if they are within another creature's Reach and that creature takes an action to shake them out of their stupor.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** When charmed by this spell, a creature is also stunned.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The side length of the cube increases by 15 feet.

name: Expedite Action
flavor: With just a word you can put the impossible just within reach.
description:
If your initiative partner is targetable and within range, you grant them an additional action they may take before the end of the current turn.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** You instead grant the additional action to a target ally within range.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

name: Festering Ire
flavor: Blades dredged in spells dredged in hate.
description:
You make a weapon attack. 

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make another weapon attack. This second attack ignores weapon attack fatigue.

Both attacks have the following effects:

* **If it hits**, the target is poisoned until this spell ends.

* **If it hits a target that is already poisoned**, the attack deals an additional **3d8 poison damage** to the target and the target is *festering* until this spell ends or they are no longer poisoned. At the start of each of your turns until this spell ends, you deal **3d8 poison damage** to all creatures and objects festering from this spell.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** Both of this spell's damage rolls increase by 1d8.

name: Forbidden Thought
flavor: You bury a psychic hook into an enemy and pull them away from you.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a basic **Quick-Wits** saving throw to resist **12d8 psychic damage**. On a failure, an affected creature cannot target you or your location until this spell ends. At the end of an affected creature's turn, they may retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

**Contagion.** As a reaction when a creature affected by a spell effect with contagion trait dies, is knocked out, or burns a Resolve, you may cause a different target creature within range to become affected by the spell as if it had failed the saving throw. Newly affected creatures are not dealt the initial damage.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 4d8.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** On a failure, an affected creature cannot target a creature or the creature's location of your choice.

name: Frostwave
flavor: You send out a rolling fog of frigid doom.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects in a cone in front of you whose length is the range of this spell to make a basic **Fortitude** save to resist **9d6 cold damage**. Additionally, all creatures in the area are slowed until this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 3d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's damage ignores DBs.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

name: Glacial Grasp
flavor: You form a wall of living ice and attempt to pin a creature to it.
description:
You create a wall made of ice that is 5 feet thick, 10 feet tall, and 15 feet wide whose endpoints are target surfaces within range. The wall may be bent and curved at your choosing, but cannot be formed into a ring. Each 5 foot length section of the wall has 10 HP, an AC of 10, and 5 Toughness. Creatures are incapable of climbing the wall without advanced Climbing mobility. When this spell ends, all sections of the wall are destroyed.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack. If the attack hits a target within 5 feet of the wall, it deals an additional **9d8 cold damage** to the target and the target becomes stuck to the wall until this spell ends. Once per round, an affected creature may take an action to make a **Poise** saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 3d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** If the target fails the **Poise** saving throw, they become restrained until this spell ends.

name: Heat Sink
flavor: "Do I cut the striped wire or the checkered one?"
description:
You conjure a *heat sink* at a target unoccupied space within range. The heat sink is a Small object with 45 HP, 15 AC, 15 Toughness, advanced Climbing mobility, and a Speed of 30 feet. This spell ends early if it is destroyed.

If the heat sink is within a creature's Reach, they may take an action to *disarm* it, ending this spell. When this spell ends without the heat sink being disarmed, all creatures and unattended objects within 30 feet of it must make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **30 fire damage**.

**Automaton.** You may issue the *commands* listed below to an object of your choice created by this spell by taking its listed kind of action. Each command may only be performed once per round:

* **Absorb (free action).** When one or more allies within 30 feet of the heat sink are dealt **fire damage**, you may redirect half of the total damage dealt to the heat sink. 

* **Move (free action during your turn).** The heat sink travels up to its Speed.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** You choose an elemental damage type other than **fire**. The damage type the heat sink may **Absorb** as well as the damage dealt by this spell is now the chosen damage type.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The heat sink's HP increases by 15 and its Toughness increases by 5\.

name: Hover
flavor: To outwit gravity, one must simply expose its lies.
description:
You grant a target creature within range basic Hovering mobility until this spell ends. Additionally, the target immediately adds 20 feet to their movement pool. This movement must be spent hovering.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** You grant advanced Hovering mobility to all affected creatures.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You target an additional creature within range.

name: Imprisonment
flavor: You shove a target into a pocket dimension.
description:
You cause a target within range to make a **Courage** saving throw. On a failure, they are sent to a harmless demiplane until this spell ends. At the end of an affected creature's turn, they may retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

When this spell ends, they return to the nearest unoccupied space from where they left.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** While in the harmless demiplane, the target is incapacitated.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

name: Lightning Link
flavor: You braid kinetic and electrical forces into a transmutational chain.
description:
You make a weapon attack.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make another weapon attack. This second attack ignores weapon attack fatigue.

If both attacks hit, a 5 foot wide line subsequently forms with endpoints that are the locations of the targets of the two attacks. You deal **3d10 lightning damage** to all creatures and objects in the area. Afterwards, the targets of the two attacks are pulled 5 feet towards each other and become prone.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 1d10.

* **(+3 INT and above)** If the targets are pulled into adjacent spaces, they become stuck to each other until the targets take an action on the same turn to cleanse the condition.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The pull distance for both targets becomes 10 feet.

name: Phantasmal Terror
flavor: The specter of fear itself haunts them.
description:
You cause a target creature to make a basic **Courage** saving throw to resist **12d8 psychic damage**. On a failure, an affected creature must take a reaction if they have one. If they do, they must travel up to its Speed away from you. Movement caused by this spell does not direct a creature to step into obviously dangerous hazards, such as steep cliffs or pools of acid.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 4d8.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You target an additional creature within range.

name: Planar Threadline
flavor: Behind the weave is someone plucking the strings.
description:
If your initiative partner is targetable and within range, they may teleport to an unoccupied space within your Reach. Afterwards, your initiative partner may take an action to make a weapon attack.

**Spellstrike.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins to make a weapon attack.

Both of these attacks deal an additional **6d6 force damage** to their respective targets on a hit.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** You teleport to your initiative partner's previous position when they teleport.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

name: Polymorph
flavor: You transform a creature into a harmless animal.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a **Will** saving throw. A creature gains a degree of advantage on the saving throw for each Resolve they have remaining. On a failure, a target is polymorphed into a Tier 0 beast creature of your choosing until this spell ends. While polymorphed in this manner, burning a Resolve does not expend it.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's duration is extended to last until you take a long rest.

name: Radiant Arsenal
flavor: Tempered souls forge their own fate.
description:
You designate up to three target allies within range. Until this spell ends, whenever an affected creature hits with a weapon attack, they deal an additional **1d8 radiant damage**. If a d8 rolled for this spell's damage has an outcome of 8, this spell is *upgraded* for all affected creatures until this spell ends.

While this spell is upgraded, the additional damage of this spell increases to **1d10 radiant damage**.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Costs 2 Selections)** This spell's normal damage die increases to 2d8 and the upgraded damage die increases to 2d10.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You target an additional creature within range.

name: Rotting Carapace
flavor: You mold decaying bark and pungent fungus into a suit of armor.
description:
Until this spell ends, you gain the following benefits:

* **Layers of Fungus.** As a free action once per round, when you are dealt damage, you may halve the damage inflicted and deal **12 necrotic damage** to all creatures and objects within 10 feet of you.

* **Towering.** Your Size increases by one category.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage increases by 4\.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The radius of the damage of **Layers of Fungus** increases by 5 feet.

name: Round Robin
flavor: Pay it forward.
description:
You cause a target ally within range to **regain 3d4 \+ 3 ST** and gain advantage on the next attack they make before this spell ends. If they make an attack before this spell ends, they may choose an ally they target within this spell's range of them that has yet to be affected by this spell to gain all of the benefits of this spell.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 1d4 \+ 1\.

name: Soul Sink
flavor: The flow of life and death is struck apart, and it flows freely.
description:
You designate a target creature within range and cause all other creatures and objects within a 15 foot radius sphere originating from the target to make a basic **Will** saving throw to resist **6d6 necrotic damage**. The target of this spell regains **6 ST** for each creature damaged by this spell.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6 and the target of this spell regains an additional 2 ST for each creature damaged by this spell.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 30 feet.

name: Squall
flavor: Thunder crackles in the distance as you echo the wrath of the sky.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects within a 25 foot cube centered in front of you to make a basic **Poise** saving throw to resist **6d6 bludgeoning damage.** On a failure, an affected creature or object is pushed 30 feet away from you and falls prone.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** On a failure, an affected creature or object is pushed 60 feet away from you rather than 30 feet.

name: Vengeful Flame
flavor: You summon the will of smoke and ash, of what has been lost and what can be reclaimed.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to **regain 12d6 \+ 6 ST**. Additionally, if the affected creature is attacked by an attacker before this spell ends, the attacker is set ablaze and this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 4d6 \+ 4\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's range becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** This spell does not end when it sets an attacker ablaze.

name: Wild Briars
flavor: You conjure a ravenous briar patch that continually consumes the earth.
description:
You create a *thicket* represented as a 15 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range that persists until this spell ends. All creatures in the thicket must make a **Poise** saving throw. On a failure, an affected creature is restrained until this spell ends. Once per round, a creature restrained by this spell may take an action to retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

While this spell persists, the surface spaces in the thicket are considered to be difficult terrain, and at the start of each of your turns, you may take a free action to choose one of the following to occur:

* **Entangle.** You cause all creatures in the thicket to make a **Poise** saving throw. On a failure, they are restrained by this spell.

* **Spread.** The radius of the thicket increases by 10 feet, to a maximum radius of 100 feet.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 3rd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above, Repeatable)** When you cast this spell, you may designate a target allied creature and make them immune to the effect of this instance of this spell.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

# **List of 4th Circle Spells**

name: Astral Ballista
flavor: Twinkling motes of light descend from the sky and coalesce into a massive brass instrument of arcane warfare.
description:
You conjure an *astral ballista* at a target unoccupied space within range that persists until this spell ends. The astral ballista is a Large object with 60 HP, 15 AC, and 20 Toughness. This spell ends early if it is destroyed. 

**Automaton.** You may issue the *commands* listed below to an object of your choice created by this spell by taking its listed kind of action. Each command may only be performed once per round:

* **Dazzlefire Beam (action).** You designate a 15 foot wide line whose length is the range of this spell originating in front of the astral ballista. All creatures and unattended objects in the area must make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **4d10 fire damage**. On a failure, an affected subject is set ablaze with the **Unready** condition trait, imposing disadvantage on **Poise** and **Reflex** saving throws.

* **Force Blast (action).** You designate a 10 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range of the astral ballista. All creatures and unattended objects in the area must make a basic **Poise** saving throw to resist **4d8 force damage**. On a failure, an affected subject is pushed 10 feet away from the astral ballista and falls prone.

* **Delegate (action).** You designate a target creature within range. Until this spell ends, they may use this spell's **Automaton** trait if the astral ballista is within their Reach (each command may still only be performed once per round between all eligible issuers).

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** The **Dazzlefire Beam** damage roll increases by 1d10 and the **Force Blast** damage roll increases by 1d8.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's range becomes 120 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** The astral ballista's HP increases by 15 and its Toughness increases by 5\.

name: Backfire Matrix
flavor: A skilled caster can shield themself from a spell's backfire. An even better one knows how to cause it.
description:
You cause all creatures and objects within a 20 foot cube originating from a target location within range to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **8d8 force damage**. For an affected creature or object that is concentrating on an effect, their concentration ends and this spell's damage roll is replaced with the maximum possible result.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d8.

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's damage ignores DBs.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

name: Bless
flavor: You bring good fortune to the troubles that await you.
description:
You grant up to three target creatures within range a \+5 bonus to all attack and combat checks they make until this spell ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You target an additional creature within range.

name: Dimensional Anchor
flavor: You weld spacetime into a series of chains anchored in the fabric of space.
description:
You conjure a *dimensional anchor* at a target unoccupied space within range and cause all creatures and objects within 15 feet of the dimensional anchor to make a **Poise** saving throw. On a failure, an affected creature or object cannot teleport and cannot move further than 15 feet from the dimensional anchor until this spell ends.

The dimensional anchor is a Small object that hovers in its place, is immovable, and has 60 HP, 15 AC, and 20 Toughness. This spell ends early if the dimensional anchor is destroyed.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell cannot be dispelled by effects such as **Dispel**.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The dimensional anchor's HP increases by 15 and its Toughness increases by 5\.

name: Enkindled Filigree
flavor: Searing, liquid light paints over a foe with bespeckled embroidery and impossible beauty. Who would dare approach such an icon of fashion?
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a basic **Courage** saving throw to resist **8d6 radiant damage**. On a failure, an affected creature incurs the following:

* **Incandescent.** At the start of each of its turns, you deal **4d6 radiant damage** to them.

* **Outstanding.** They cannot benefit from being invisible and all other creatures within 15 feet of them are frightened of them until they are further away.

* **Shed Expectations.** When they have 0 ST, they may take an action to end this spell for themself.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's initial damage roll increases by 2d6 and its **Incandescent** damage roll increases by 1d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** Using **Shed Expectations** requires taking two actions instead of one.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of **Outstanding** becomes 30 feet.

name: Fey Crossing
flavor: You overrun an area with fey magic and grow a mighty tree. Its canopy shelters the chaos within.
description:
You designate a 25 foot radius, 50 foot tall cylinder originating from a target floor surface within range. The following effects are created within the area:

* **Looping.** A creature that attempts to travel out of this spell's area instead appears on the diametrically opposite side of the area. This effect does not occur when teleporting or when traveling out of the top or bottom faces of the cylindrical area.

* **Mushrooms.** When you cast this spell, you may plant up to five *mushrooms* each at target 5 foot unoccupied spaces within the area. The mushrooms are invisible to any number of creatures of your choosing. When a creature enters a mushroom's space, the mushroom is destroyed, the creature's movement pool is cleared, and they must make a **Fortitude** saving throw. On a failure, a creature is incapacitated until the end of the current turn.

* **Tree.** A 50 foot tall *tree* appears at the area's centerpoint with a 5 foot diameter trunk. Creatures are pushed out into nearby unoccupied spaces if the tree appears in their space. The top of the tree fans out into a thick canopy covering the top of the cylinder. The canopy is a solid material of 15 Toughness and any holes piercing through it regenerate at the start of your turn.

When this spell ends, everything created by this spell instantly disappears.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** When you cast this spell, you may plant three more mushrooms.

name: Gelatinous Crew
duration: Until the end of your next long rest
flavor: A gross but ultimately harmless liquefaction.
description:
You cause any number of willing creatures within range to become polymorphed into a Tier 0 ooze creature form with the following statistics until this spell ends:

* **Movement.** A Speed of 15 feet with advanced Climbing mobility. They are able to squeeze through gaps with diameters of 1 inch or greater.

* **Size.** Size equal to their original form.

* **Modifiers.** STR, DEX, and CON of \+0, and INT, WIS, and CHA equal to their respective original forms. Their Tier Bonus is equal to their original form.

* **AC.** Their Base AC, Half Guard, and Full Guard AC is 11, 13, and 15, respectively.

* **HP and ST.** They have 50 HP and ST.

* **Coagulate.** As a free action, they may end this spell for them.

name: Hypeline
flavor: Call now for immediate results.
description:
You cause both you and a target initiative partner within range to **regain 4d8 \+ 4 ST** and add 15 feet of your Speeds until this spell ends. Additionally, a *hypeline* appears as a 5 foot wide line whose endpoints are your location and the target's location. As you and your target move, the endpoints of the hypeline move along with. If a hypeline passes through a creature, they **regain 4d8 \+ 4 ST**. A creature cannot be affected by this spell more than once.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 1d8 \+ 1\.

name: Leyline Jaunt
flavor: The rapids of reality bubble up and invite a dive.
description:
You teleport any number of target creatures within range to a place you know that satisfies the below requirements:

* **Coplanar.** The place must be on the same plane of existence as you are.

* **Leyline Knot.** The place must be a *leyline knot* that you know, an intangible phenomena that can be created through the casting of a 7th Circle spell. The GM determines where and how many leyline knots already exist.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** You may ignore the **Coplanar** requirement.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** You may ignore the **Leyline Knot** requirement.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The casting time of this spell becomes 6 actions, and these actions may be taken across two consecutive rounds.

name: Miasma
flavor: A heavy bog stench wafts out of the ground; so putrid it could kill.
description:
You designate a 20 foot radius, 15 foot tall cylinder originating from a target surface within range that persists until this spell ends. Once per round, if a creature starts its turn in the area or moves into it, they must make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **8d6 poison damage**. On a failure, an affected creature is poisoned until the start of their next turn.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** Once per round, you may take an action to move the origin of the area up to 30 feet to a target surface within range.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 30 feet.

name: Mirror Fate
flavor: You tether the fates of two creatures: harm done to one does to the other.
description:
Two target creatures within range must make a **Will** saving throw. If both creatures fail the saving throw, the two creatures are *fate-linked* to each other until this spell ends. A fate-linked creature suffers the following effects:

* Whenever a fate-linked creature takes damage or regains ST, instead all fate-linked creatures take that amount of damage or ST recovery.

* Conditions afflicting one fate-linked creature instead are applied to all fate-linked creatures.

This spell ends when either fate-linked creature dies or expends a Resolve, and the effect ends on both creatures if either effect ends.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's saving throw DC is increased by 2\.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You may target an additional creature within range. This spell ends if the effect ends for any of the fate-linked creatures.

name: Parley
duration: Until your next short or long rest
flavor: Let our words stand in the place of spears and our battles be waged in the throes of negotiation. Blood shall not be spilled upon these sacred grounds.
description:
You designate a 30 foot radius, 30 foot tall cylinder originating from a target floor within range. Until this spell ends, creatures in the area are pacified.

**Permanence.** When this spell begins, you may expend a Resource to cause this spell's duration to become Indefinite.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** Creatures of your choosing in the area are also charmed by you.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** While in the area, you gain advantage on WIS effort and trade checks.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The area is doubled in all dimensions. If you are using this spell's **Permanence** spell trait, this enhancement instead quadruples the total area in all dimensions.

name: Receive Spirit
flavor: You follow the threads tethered to their remains and close possessions, drawing their soul from endless sleep and beseeching it for its knowledge.
description:
You call forth the soul of a dead creature from a target *vestige* within range that belongs to it. The vestige may be a full or partial corpse or skeleton, but must have its skull at the minimum.

Until this spell ends, you may ask the soul up to three questions and it is compelled to answer each of them. The soul is only able to answer your questions using the knowledge it had up to the moment of its death, though it may recognize you and choose to answer your questions differently based on your identity, and it may try to deceive you.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** The soul's answers must be truthful, though they may be incomplete.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The target vestige no longer requires a skull and may now instead be an object owned by the soul during its life.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You may ask up to five questions instead of three.

name: Reticence Sigil
duration: Until the end of your next long rest
flavor: A spiraling glyph shaped to channel informative energies into itself and then safely disperse it.
description:
You grant a target creature within range the following effects until this spell ends:

* **Anti-Scry.** They are invisible to creatures perceiving using the **Scrying** spell trait.

* **Anti-Sensor.** The **Sensor** spell trait does not activate for them.

* **Anti-Telepathy.** Telepathic communications with them fail.

* **Thought Guard.** They gain advantage on **Will** saving throws.

name: Shifting Timeline
flavor: Each choice creates an infinite number of parallel timelines. Choose wisely.
description:
Choose any number of target willing creatures within range. Those creatures are teleported to target unoccupied spaces within range.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above, Repeatable)** You may additionally target unwilling creatures to be affected if they fail a **Poise** saving throw. If this enhancement is selected twice, there is no saving throw (they are always teleported).

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's range becomes 60 feet.

name: Spectral Guardians
flavor: Those that answer the call find rest only in duty.
description:
You cause up to three target creatures within range to gain a *spectral guardian* for each creature that immediately causes the creature to **regain 2d6 \+ 2 ST**. Each creature's spectral guardian lasts until this spell ends and grants the following benefits:

* **Aegis.** Attacks against the creature incur disadvantage.

* **Parting Gift.** After the next time the creature takes damage, they **regain 2d6 \+ 2 ST**. Afterwards, the spectral guardian dissipates and this spell ends for them.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 2nd, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** Both of this spell's ST recovery roll increase by 1d6 \+ 1\.

name: Starlight Solace
flavor: You wrest your allies from the iron grip of cruelty.
description:
You designate a 15 foot diameter, 120 foot tall cylinder originating from a target floor within range. All creatures in the area **regain 4d6 \+ 4 ST** and are cleansed of the incapacitated condition.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you double the amount of ST regained for all affected creatures.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 1d6 \+ 1\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell also cleanses the stunned condition for all affected creatures.

name: Thoughtstream
flavor: You open your heart and soul to form a channel into another's.
description:
You target yourself and a creature within range to *connect* both you and them until this spell ends. This spell ends early if any connected creatures are further than this spell's range from each other. All connected creatures gain the following effects:

* **Skim Surface.** They may read the surface thoughts and emotions of any other creature affected by this spell.

* **Dive Deeper.** As a free action, they may cause another creature affected by this spell to make a **Quick-Wits** saving throw (against your Spell Save DC). On a failure, they may learn any deeper thoughts and feelings, including thoughts the creature would want to keep secret. Each connected creature may take this free action for this spell at most once.

name: Transplanar Crossroads
flavor: You unlock a passage into an infamous complex shared by powerful wizards from all corners of the universe. A thin veneer of cooperation buries the endless contingencies and hidden exits sprawling throughout.
description:
You conjure a doorway at a target location within range. The doorway is a Large object with 20 HP, 10 AC, and 30 Toughness. The doorway leads into an extradimensional space and a corresponding doorway inside the space leads back out. Both doorways persist until this spell ends, and this spell ends early if either doorway is destroyed. This spell may not be dismissed early.

All doorways created from **Transplanar Crossroads** from all casters of the spell lead to the same extradimensional space, though the doorways appear at different locations inside of it. **Transplanar Crossroads** cannot be cast while inside the extradimensional space.

The GM determines the size, nature, contents, and whether there are other doorways that currently exist inside **Transplanar Crossroad's** extradimensional space.

name: Violent Bloom
flavor: Wicked vines untangle your friends and strangle your prey.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to **regain 16d6 \+ 16 ST** and become cleansed of the prone, stuck, and restrained conditions. If the target was stuck or restrained, their next weapon attack that hits before this spell ends *violently blooms* and causes the target of the attack to become stuck until the end of their next turn.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's ST recovery roll increases by 4d6 \+ 4\.

* **(+3 INT and above)** The weapon attack that violently blooms inflicts restrained instead of stuck.

name: Void Tentacles
flavor: You draw horrors from the deepest reaches of the planespace.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a basic **Courage** saving throw to resist **8d10 cold damage.** On a failure, the creature is restrained by this spell until this spell ends. Once per round, a creature restrained by this may take an action to retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success and taking an additional **8d6 cold damage** on a failure.

**Contagion.** As a reaction when a creature affected by a spell effect with contagion trait dies, is knocked out, or burns a Resolve, you may cause a different target creature within range to become affected by the spell as if it had failed the saving throw. Newly affected creatures are not dealt the initial damage.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's initial damage roll increases by 2d10 and the restrained failure damage roll increases by 2d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's damage ignores DBs.

* **(+3 CHA and above, Repeatable)** You target an additional creature within range.

name: Warp Cage
flavor: Your personality is electrostatic...
description:
Creatures of your choosing within range when this spell is cast must make a **Quick-Wits** saving throw. On a failure, a creature is pulled into a space adjacent to you. At the start of your next turn, all creatures within 5 feet of you are stunned until the end of their next turn.

***Heightening.*** For each additional Circle above 4th, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** this spell's saving throw DC is increased by 2\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 30 feet.

# **List of 5th Circle Spells**

name: CastigatorРІР‚в„ўs Will
flavor: Misguided hope is always the last to crumble.
description:
When a target creature within range makes a saving throw, you may cast **Castigator's Will** as a reaction. The target automatically fails the saving throw.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** If the triggering effect has a saving throw to end the effect early, the target automatically fails those subsequent saving throws as well.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's range becomes 60 feet.

name: Chain Lightning
flavor: You feel the shadow of unlimited power as electricity arcs between your fingertips.
description:
When this spell begins and at the start of your next turn, you may cause up to five target creatures within range where each target is within 10 feet of at least one other target to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **5d6 lightning damage**. On a failure, an affected creature either takes one fewer action on their next turn or takes one fewer action when they burn a Resolve, whichever happens first.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* This spell's damage roll becomes 6d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** A creature that fails this spell's saving throw is also disoriented until the end of its next turn.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You may target two additional targets within range.

name: Conceptual Entangler
flavor: A knotted ball of reflective yarn, able to accept and return thought waves directed at it. Not a mirror, but an amplifier of an idea's complexity.
description:
You conjure a *conceptual entangler* at a target unoccupied space within range that persists until this spell ends. A conceptual entangler is a Tiny object with 75 HP, 21 AC, and 0 Toughness. This spell ends early if it is destroyed. 

**Automaton.** You may issue the *commands* listed below to an object of your choice created by this spell. You must take the listed kind of action in each of the following commands to activate this spell trait, and each command may only be performed once per round:

* **Mindlink (free action).** The conceptual entangler *mindlinks* with a creature it targets within 30 feet of it. The creature remains mindlinked with the conceptual entangler while they are within that distance of each other, and multiple creatures may be mindlinked at the same time. A mindlinked creature gains the following benefits:

  * **Compartmentalization.** They gain DB 20 against **psychic damage**.

  * **Complication.** They may ignore **INT** requirements when choosing a heightening enhancement for a heightened spell.

  * **Counterlogic.** They gain advantage on **Quick-Wits** saving throws and are immune to being charmed, disoriented, incapacitated, or stunned.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The distance the conceptual entangler may mindlink with creatures becomes up to 60 feet feet away from it. The conceptual entangler gains a Speed of 15 feet and the **Automaton** trait gains the following command:

  * **Move (free action during your turn).** The conceptual entangler travels up to its Speed.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The DB of **Compartmentalization** becomes 30\.

name: Dance Fever
flavor: Your infectious energy causes others to join you in a big dance.
description:
You cause up to three target creatures within range to make a **Will** saving throw. On a failure, a creature is charmed by you until this spell ends. While charmed by this spell, an affected creature is stunned as they dance in place. At the end of an affected creature's turn, they may retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

Once per round until this spell ends (including when you cast this spell) you may take an action to add half your Speed to your movement pool and cause an additional creature within range to make a **Will** saving throw. On a failure, the target becomes charmed by this spell in the same manner as above.

When you spend movement granted by this spell, all creatures you have charmed by this spell travelare forcibly moved in the same direction and distance as your movements.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** The DC of all saving throws imposed by this spell are increased by 2\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** this spell's range becomes 120 feet.

name: Freeze
flavor: You stall the biology of a target with a terrifying coldness.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a **Fortitude** saving throw. On a failure, a target is frozen until this spell ends. At the end of an affected creature's turn, they may retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

**Contagion.** As a reaction when a creature affected by a spell effect with contagion trait dies, is knocked out, or burns a Resolve, you may cause a different target creature within range to become affected by the spell as if it had failed the saving throw.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 INT and above)** This spell's saving throw DC is increased by 2\.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

name: Lifelink
flavor: As threads catch in the light, bind them.
description:
You cause up to four creatures within range to become *lifelinked* with each other until this spell ends. If this spell ends for one lifelinked creature, it ends for all creatures lifelinked with them. All damage dealt to one or more lifelinked creatures is redirected to be evenly divided amongst all creatures lifelinked with this spell.

Additionally, if a lifelinked creature makes a saving throw or multiple simultaneously, all of their lifelinked creatures make the saving throw. The best total amongst the saving throws made is used for all lifelinked creatures, and all lifelinked creatures are affected by the success or failure effects caused by the saving throw.

Lastly, at the start of a lifelinked creature's turn, that creature **regains 5d4 \+ 5 ST**.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* This spell's ST recovery die becomes 6d4 \+ 6\.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You target an additional creature within range.

name: Locumance
flavor: The art of making you both the pen and the paper.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a basic **Poise** saving throw to resist **20d6 force damage**. On a failure, an affected creature is forcibly teleported to a target unoccupied space within range.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(Repeatable)** This spell's damage roll becomes 24d6.

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 120 feet.

name: Maelstrom
flavor: A tornado forms out of torrential winds and whirling seawater, sweeping up everything in its wake.
description:
You create a *maelstrom* represented as a 20 foot radius, 120 foot tall cylinder originating from a target floor within range that persists until this spell ends. If a creature starts its turn in the maelstrom or moves into it, they must make a **Poise** saving throw. On a failure, an affected creature is restrained by this spell and pulled to the center of the maelstrom. A creature restrained by this spell may take an action to retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success and ejecting themselves out of the maelstrom. If the creature exits the maelstrom while restrained by this spell, they are no longer restrained.

Unattended objects in the maelstrom's path are automatically restrained and pulled to the center of the maelstrom. At the end of every round, creatures and objects restrained by the maelstrom is dealt **10d6 bludgeoning damage**.

Additionally, once per round, you may take an action to cause the origin point of the maelstrom to travel up to 30 feet to a target floor within range. All creatures and objects already restrained by this spell are moved with the maelstrom. Any creature or object the maelstrom passes over during this movement is subjected to its effects similar to above.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* This spell's damage die becomes 12d6.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The radius of this spell's area becomes 40 feet.

name: Pseudochemical Heart
flavor: A rune-laiden, pulsating leather bag crafted with the express purpose of pumping you up.
description:
You cause a target willing creature within range to gain the following effects until this spell ends:

* **Adrenaline Pool.** An affected creature has an *adrenaline pool* of dice that starts at 0d4. When this spell ends for a creature, they are dealt **injuring poison damage** equal to a rolling of the adrenaline pool.

* **Expand.** Once during an affected creature's turn or when they expend a Resolve, they may immediately take an action of their choice as a free action (which may be used as part of a multiaction). If they do, they add 3d4 to their adrenaline pool.

* **Contract.** As an action, an affected creature may remove 3d4 from their adrenaline pool.

* **Expire.** After an affected creature has used **Expand** or **Contract** a combined total of five times, this spell ends early for them.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell ends after using **Expand** or **Contract** a combined total of seven times.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** An affected creature may add half their Speed to their movement pool when they **Contract**.

name: Rime of Reason
