flavor: The freezing tundra air cuts through to the unyielding truth.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to **regain 20d6 \+ 20 ST** and become cleansed of the charmed, incapacitated, and stunned conditions. Additionally, an affected creature gains the following benefits until this spell ends:

* They gain DB 15 against **cold** and **fire damage**.

* They gain advantage on **Quick-Wits** and **Will** saving throws.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* This spell's ST recovery roll becomes 24d6 \+ 24\.

* **(+3 INT and above)** Additionally, the target is cleansed of the frozen condition.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The DB becomes 25\.

name: Sacred Geometry
flavor: Any two points make a line.
description:
You designate a 60 foot radius circle originating from a target location within range and then create three 5 foot wide 120 foot long lines originating from a point on the edge of the circle. All creatures and objects in the sphere must make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **10d6 radiant damage**. Creatures inside both the sphere and one of the lines are immune to the damage from this spell and instead regain **10d6 ST**.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* This spell's damage and healing roll both become 12d6.

* **(+3 INT and above)** You invert the effect of this spell: creatures in the circle regain ST while creatures both in the circle and in one of the lines must make the basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist the damage of this spell.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You create a fourth line.

name: Sculpt Earth
flavor: You reform the landscape.
description:
You designate a 60 foot cube originating from a target location within range. All forms of terrain of 10 Toughness or below within the area, such as its floors, walls, and ceilings, may be modified in the following ways:

* **Destruction.** You may destroy floors, walls, or ceilings. You are able to collapse entryways and form new ones.

* **Difficult Terrain.** You may designate any surface in the area to be difficult terrain or be cleared of being difficult terrain.

* **Formation.** You may conjure walls, floors, or ceiling made of a material of 10 Toughness or below.

* **Relocation.** You may take portions of walls, floors, or ceilings and move them to locations within the area.

Structures formed by this spell ignore the effects of gravity while this spell persists. However, once this spell ends, modifications to the terrain made by this spell do not return to their original arrangement. 

If terrain modifications created by this spell would forcibly move a creature or trap them, the creature may make a **Poise** or **Reflex** saving throw. On a success, they may take a reaction to add half their Speed to their movement pool which they may immediately spend as this spell takes effect to find safety.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** The range of this spell becomes 60 feet.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** The area's side length becomes 120 feet.

name: Triple Take
flavor: Seeing what is ahead, you steer the immediate future off its course.
description:
You may cast this spell as a reaction at any point. You grant up to two target creatures within range other than yourself an additional reaction that they may take before the start of their next turn. Reactions granted from **Triple Take** cannot be used to cast **Triple Take**.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* **(+3 WIS and above)** This spell's casting time is reduced to a free action.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You target a third creature within range other than yourself.

name: Turn the Tide
flavor: At the end of everything, stand tall.
description:
You cause up to three target creatures within range to **regain 5d6 \+ 5 ST** and gain the following additional benefits until this spell ends:

* **A Door Opens.** All attacks they make have their critical strike threshold reduced by 2\.

* **Another Closes.** All attacks against them have their critical strike threshold increased by 2\. If this would cause an attack's critical strike threshold to increase above 20, the attack instead cannot score a critical hit.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you double the amount of ST regained for all affected creatures.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* This spell's ST recovery die becomes 6d6 \+ 6\.

name: Twin Parallax
flavor: They truly are seeing double.
description:
You cause up to two target creatures within range to **regain** **10d4 \+ 10 ST** and become *parallaxed* until this spell ends. When a *parallaxed* creature takes the Dodge action on their turn, the next attack made against them before this spell ends automatically misses.

***Heightening.*** When cast at 6th Circle, choose one of the enhancements below:

* This spell's ST recovery roll increases to 12d4 \+ 12\.

* **(+3 CHA and above)** You target up to four creatures within range.

# **List of 6th Circle Spells**

name: Anathemic Release
flavor: The hated form is destroyed, the one unbound set in its place.
description:
You designate a 15 foot diameter sphere originating from a target location within range. All creatures in the area **regain 6d6 \+ 6 ST** and are cleansed of all conditions and effects of the target's choosing.

**Expound.** You may take an additional action when this spell begins. If you do, you double the amount of ST regained for all affected creatures.

name: Disintegrate
flavor: Die.
description:
You cause a target creature or object within range to make a basic **Fortitude** saving throw to resist **30d8 force damage**. For every Resolve the target has remaining, decrease the damage roll by **2d8 force damage**. If the damage from this spell causes the target to expend a Resolve, the remaining damage is not discarded and instead continues to be dealt to the target after it regains the HP and ST from expending the Resolve.

If this spell kills the target, it is reduced to ash.

name: Earthquake
flavor: You awaken the ancient words commanding the formation of continents back into speaking tongue.
description:
You cause the earth in a 100 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range to fold and tremor for the duration of this spell.

Until this spell ends, all of the following effects occur simultaneously:

* **Difficult Terrain.** All surfaces in the area are considered to be difficult terrain.

* **Tremors.** At the end of your turn, every creature standing in a surface space in the area must make a **Poise** saving throw, falling prone on a failure.

* **Additional Effect.** When you cast this spell and as an action on your future turns until this spell ends, you can cause one of the following effects to occur:

  * **Building Collapse.** A building in the area collapses, potentially trapping any creature inside. All creatures become restrained under a pile of rubble, taking any falling damage the rubble would have taken based on the maximum height of the building. A STR effort check against your spell save DC may be used to escape or help a creature escape.

  * **Fissure.** A fissure 20 feet wide, 60 feet long, and 60 feet deep erupts in this spell's area. A creature on those spaces falls into the fissure and takes the appropriate falling damage.

  * **Landslide**. A cliff or overhang of earth in the area collapses, and slides downhill. All creatures standing atop the crumbling surface or caught in the wake of the avalanche of earth are carried off in some direction, potentially outside of this spell's area.

\\This spell may take on other effects as well, depending on the surrounding terrain. When this spell ends, all modifications made to the terrain with this spell remain.

name: Heart of the Storm
flavor: A bolt of lightning strikes an ally with explosive resurgence.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to gain the following benefits:

* **Cleansing.** The target is cleansed of the incapacitated, stunned and frozen conditions.

* **Recovery.** The target **regains 24d6 ST**. For each d6 rolled whose outcome is a 6, the d6 *explodes* and you add an additional d6 to the ST recovery roll. All d6s added to the ST recovery roll may also explode if their outcome is a 6\.

* **Explosion.** Creatures of your choosing within 15 feet of the target must make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **lightning damage** equal to 5 x the number of d6s that exploded.

name: Into the Fold
flavor: Yeah, I'm thinking we're back.
description: You cause up to five willing creatures to teleport to an unoccupied space within your Reach and **regain 6d8 \+ 12 ST**. A creature must be on the same plane of existence as you to be affected by this spell.

name: Labyrinthine Marble
flavor: You trap your foes into a maze of your own twisting design encased within a small marble.
description:
You cause all creatures within a 10 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range to be teleported into a demiplane known as a *maze plane*. Additionally, a Tiny marble with 50 HP, 20 AC, and 25 Toughness appears at the target location. This marble contains the maze plane and this spell ends if it is broken. Additionally, the marble is surprisingly heavy, requiring a DC 20 STR effort check to lift, carry, push, or pull it.

When a creature trapped in a maze plane starts their turn, they may make an INT effort check and add the result to a running score. If multiple creatures travel together, only one creature makes the INT effort check for the whole group. Once a creature surpasses a threshold score of 50, they reach the boundaries of the maze and may inflict damage upon or take Wreck an Object actions against the marble from the inside.

When this spell ends, all creatures trapped in the maze plane are ejected onto the nearest unoccupied spaces from the marble's location.

name: Mantle of Hyperreality
flavor: For a world of broken rules and unraveled ambition, you wear it well.
description:
When you cast this spell and as a free action at the start of each of your subsequent turns until this spell ends, you cause up to three target creatures within range to make a **Quick-Wits** saving throw. On a failure, it suffers one of the following effects of your choosing (these effects may be selected individually for each target):

* **Minimize.** The target shrinks to size Tiny and cannot inflict damage until the end of their next turn.

* **Reverse Gravity.** Gravity is reversed for the target and they begin falling upwards until the end of its next turn. As a reminder, if unobstructed, a creature would fall upward 500 feet per round.

* **Rewind.** The target is teleported to the space of either where they were one minute ago or when combat began and is disoriented until the end of its next turn. If that space is occupied, they are teleported to the nearest unoccupied space.

name: Meteor Swarm
flavor: For you, doomsday is the day the sky fell and shattered your ramparts. For me, it was Tuesday.
description: You cause all creatures in a 60 foot radius sphere originating from a target location within range to fall prone and be set ablaze. Immediately afterwards, they must make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **6d10 fire damage**. Once per round, including the round you cast this spell, you may take an action to repeat this spell's effect.

name: Nebulaic Barrage
flavor: You recreate the chaotic birth of stars as a shower of arcane missiles.
description: You roll Xd10, where X is your spellcasting modifier, and fire a number of missiles equal to the total. You may direct each missile to strike one target creature and multiple missiles may be directed against one creature. A creature is dealt **1d6 force damage** for each missile that strikes them. If multiple missiles strike one target, the missiles are collectively considered to be one instance of damage.

name: Petrify
flavor: You ensnare a target within a statuesque living death.
description:
You cause a target creature within range to make a **Fortitude** saving throw. On a failure, an affected creature is restrained. While restrained in this manner, an affected creature may take an action to retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success. This action may be taken multiple times within a turn.

If a creature restrained by this spell ends their turn having not succeeded on a saving throw against this spell, they must expend a Resolve or become turned to stone. If a creature ends their turn having not been turned to stone, this spell ends.

While turned to stone, a creature has the following properties:

* They cannot escape this state short of a 7th Circle **Wish** spell.

* They are incapacitated and cease aging.

* They can be treated as an object with an amount of HP equal to its maximum, an AC equal to its Full Guard AC, and 30 Toughness.

name: Ragnarok
flavor: Divine forces war, perish, and rise again.
description:
You designate a 60 foot radius sphere centered in a target location within range. When you cast this spell, and at the end of each of your next two turns, creatures within the sphere are subjected to a series of effects:

* **When cast:** A giant, radiant blade falls from the sky, causing all creatures within the area to make a basic **Reflex** saving throw to resist **6d10 radiant damage**. Until the end of your next turn, Divine spells cast in this spell's area have their casting time shortened by one action and cost twice the Spell Points.

* **At the end of your first subsequent turn:** Fire erupts from the earth, causing all creatures standing on a surface in the area to make a **Reflex** saving throw to resist **6d10 fire damage**. All creatures and objects in the area are set ablaze for the duration of this spell. Until the end of your next turn, Divine spells cannot be cast within the area.

* **At the end of your second subsequent turn:** Rain falls within the area, causing all creatures within the area to regain **9d6 ST**, and this spell ends.

name: Stunning Paradox
flavor: You twist a target's thought process into a cascading causal loop.
description: You cause a target creature within range to make a basic **Quick-Wits** saving throw to resist **24d6 psychic damage**. On a failure, the target is stunned until this spell ends. Additionally, if the target is within the Reach of a creature, that creature may take an action to cause the target to retry the saving throw, ending the effect on a success. If an affected creature fails the saving throw when they retry it, the creature that attempted to help them is also stunned until this spell ends.

name: Time Stop
flavor: You unwind the twisting and spiraling continuum of time to splice in a small addition.
description: You may only cast this spell on your turn once per round. You take three additional actions of your choosing. Other than your movement, the effects of the actions you take do not occur until all three additional actions are taken.
